components.components/meter.rip:
# Meter — accessible headless meter (gauge)
#
# For known-range measurements (disk usage, password strength, etc.).
# Exposes value and thresholds as CSS custom properties.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Meter value: 0.7, low: 0.3, high: 0.8, optimum: 0.5
#   Meter value: 75, min: 0, max: 100

export Meter = component
  @value:: number := 0
  @min:: number := 0
  @max:: number := 1
  @low:: any := null
  @high:: any := null
  @optimum:: any := null
  @label:: any := null

  percent ~= Math.min(100, Math.max(0, ((@value - @min) / (@max - @min)) * 100))

  level ~=
    return 'optimum' unless @low? and @high?
    if @value <= @low then 'low'
    else if @value >= @high then 'high'
    else 'optimum'

  render
    div role: "meter"
      aria-valuenow: @value
      aria-valuemin: @min
      aria-valuemax: @max
      aria-label: @label?!
      style: "--meter-value: #{@value}; --meter-percent: #{percent}%"
      $level: level
      slot
components.components/grid.rip:
# Grid — high-performance headless data grid with virtual scrolling
#
# Renders 100K+ rows at 60fps. Semantic <table> with sticky header.
# Selection, keyboard navigation, inline editing, sorting, column resize.
# Exposes data-* attributes for all interactive states. Themeable via
# CSS custom properties (--grid-*). Ships zero layout CSS — bring your own.
#
# Usage:
#   Grid
#     data: employees
#     columns: [
#       { key: 'name',   title: 'Name',   width: 200 }
#       { key: 'age',    title: 'Age',    width: 80, align: 'right' }
#       { key: 'role',   title: 'Role',   width: 150, type: 'select', source: roles }
#       { key: 'active', title: 'Active', width: 60,  type: 'checkbox' }
#     ]
#     rowHeight: 32
#     overscan: 5
#     @beforeEdit: (row, col, oldVal, newVal) -> newVal
#     @afterEdit: (row, col, oldVal, newVal) -> null

export Grid = component

  @data:: any[] := []
  @columns:: any[] := []
  @rowHeight:: number := 32
  @headerHeight:: number := 36
  @overscan:: number := 5
  @striped:: boolean := false
  @beforeEdit:: any := null
  @afterEdit:: any := null

  formatRegistry = []

  registerFormat = (code, formatFn, parseFn) ->
    id = formatRegistry.length
    formatRegistry.push({ code, format: formatFn, parse: parseFn })
    id

  formatMap := new Map()

  _resolveCol = (ci) ->
    fid = formatMap.get("0,#{ci + 1}")
    if fid isnt undefined then return formatRegistry[fid]
    gid = formatMap.get("0,0")
    if gid isnt undefined then formatRegistry[gid] else null

  colFormatCache ~=
    cache = []
    ci = 0
    while ci < @columns.length
      cache.push(_resolveCol(ci))
      ci++
    cache

  cellFormat = (row, col) ->
    fid = formatMap.get("#{row + 1},#{col + 1}")
    if fid isnt undefined then formatRegistry[fid] else colFormatCache[col]

  _ready          := false
  scrollTop       := 0
  containerHeight := 0
  activeRow       := -1
  activeCol       := -1
  anchorRow       := -1
  anchorCol       := -1
  selecting       := false
  editing         := false
  editValue       := ''
  _enterCommit    = false
  dataVersion     := 0
  sortKeys        := []

  cmp = (a, b) -> (a > b) - (a < b)

  sortIndex ~=
    dataVersion
    len = @data.length
    idx = new Array(len)
    i = 0
    while i < len
      idx[i] = i
      i++
    if sortKeys.length > 0
      idx.sort (a, b) ->
        ki = 0
        while ki < sortKeys.length
          sk = sortKeys[ki]
          va = @data[a][@columns[sk.col].key]
          vb = @data[b][@columns[sk.col].key]
          result = if sk.dir is 'asc' then cmp(va, vb) else cmp(vb, va)
          if result isnt 0 then return result
          ki++
        a - b
    idx

  sortInfo ~=
    arrows = new Array(@columns.length).fill('')
    ranks = new Array(@columns.length).fill(0)
    ki = 0
    while ki < sortKeys.length
      sk = sortKeys[ki]
      arrows[sk.col] = if sk.dir is 'asc' then " ↓" else " ↑"
      ranks[sk.col] = ki + 1
      ki++
    { arrows, ranks }

  cellRef     ~= if activeRow >= 0 and activeCol >= 0 then "R#{activeRow + 1}:C#{activeCol + 1}" else ''
  totalRows   ~= @data.length
  startRow    ~= Math.max(0, Math.floor(scrollTop / @rowHeight) - @overscan)
  endRow      ~= Math.min(totalRows - 1, Math.ceil((scrollTop + containerHeight) / @rowHeight) + @overscan)
  offsetY     ~= startRow * @rowHeight
  bottomSpace ~= Math.max(0, (totalRows - endRow - 1) * @rowHeight)

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # DOM Recycling — pooled <tr>/<td> elements, imperative updates on scroll
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #
  # Instead of letting the reactive render loop recreate row components on
  # every scroll frame, we maintain a fixed pool of <tr> elements and update
  # cell textContent directly. This eliminates DOM allocation and GC pressure
  # during fast scrolling — the most performance-critical path in the grid.

  _trPool = []
  _topSpacer = null
  _botSpacer = null
  _selBorder = null

  _createSpacer: ->
    tr = document.createElement('tr')
    tr.className = 'spacer'
    td = document.createElement('td')
    td.style.padding = '0'
    td.style.border = 'none'
    td.style.lineHeight = '0'
    td.style.fontSize = '0'
    tr.appendChild(td)
    tr

  _ensurePool: (needed, numCols) ->
    while _trPool.length < needed
      tr = document.createElement('tr')
      ci = 0
      while ci < numCols
        td = document.createElement('td')
        tr.appendChild(td)
        ci++
      _trPool.push(tr)
    # Add cells if column count grew
    for tr in _trPool
      while tr.children.length < numCols
        tr.appendChild(document.createElement('td'))

  # Effect: update tbody rows from pool on every viewport/data change
  ~>
    return unless _ready
    tbody = @_body
    return unless tbody
    numCols = @columns.length
    count = endRow - startRow + 1
    count = 0 if count < 0

    @_ensurePool(count, numCols)

    _topSpacer.children[0].colSpan = numCols
    _topSpacer.children[0].style.height = "#{offsetY}px"
    _botSpacer.children[0].colSpan = numCols
    _botSpacer.children[0].style.height = "#{bottomSpace}px"

    # Detach all current rows (fast: replaceChildren rebuilds in one
    # reflow instead of N removeChild calls)
    rows = [_topSpacer]

    i = 0
    n = startRow
    while n <= endRow
      if n >= 0 and n < totalRows
        tr = _trPool[i]
        di = sortIndex[n]
        row = @data[di]

        # Stripe class
        if @striped and n % 2 is 1
          tr.className = 'even'
        else
          tr.className = ''

        # Update cells — only textContent, the cheapest DOM mutation
        ci = 0
        while ci < numCols
          td = tr.children[ci]
          c = @columns[ci]
          v = row[c.key]
          fmt = cellFormat(di, ci)
          display = if fmt then fmt.format(v) else v

          td.style.textAlign = c.align or 'left'

          if c.type is 'checkbox'
            # Checkbox cells need an <input> — reuse if present
            inp = td.firstChild
            unless inp and inp.tagName is 'INPUT'
              td.textContent = ''
              inp = document.createElement('input')
              inp.type = 'checkbox'
              inp.className = 'cell-checkbox'
              inp.style.pointerEvents = 'none'
              inp.style.margin = '0'
              inp.style.verticalAlign = 'middle'
              td.appendChild(inp)
            inp.checked = !!v
          else
            # Plain text — fastest path
            if td.firstChild and td.firstChild.nodeType is 3
              td.firstChild.nodeValue = if display? then String(display) else ''
            else
              td.textContent = if display? then String(display) else ''

          ci++
        rows.push(tr)
        i++
      n++

    rows.push(_botSpacer)
    tbody.replaceChildren(...rows)

  # Selection overlay — applies data-* attributes to active/selected cells
  ~>
    return unless _ready
    tbody = @_body
    return unless tbody
    trs = tbody.querySelectorAll('tr:not(.spacer)')

    for el in tbody.querySelectorAll('td[data-active], td[data-selected]')
      delete el.dataset.active
      delete el.dataset.selected
      el.style.borderColor = ''

    unless _selBorder
      _selBorder = document.createElement('div')
      _selBorder.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;pointer-events:none;border:0;outline:1px solid #3b82f6;outline-offset:-1px;z-index:1;display:none'
      @_container.appendChild(_selBorder)

    if anchorRow >= 0 and activeRow >= 0 and anchorCol >= 0 and activeCol >= 0
      minR = Math.min(anchorRow, activeRow)
      maxR = Math.max(anchorRow, activeRow)
      minC = Math.min(anchorCol, activeCol)
      maxC = Math.max(anchorCol, activeCol)
      multi = minR isnt maxR or minC isnt maxC
      r = Math.max(minR, startRow)
      while r <= Math.min(maxR, endRow)
        tr = trs[r - startRow]
        if tr
          c = minC
          while c <= maxC
            td = tr.children[c]
            if td
              td.dataset.selected = ''
              td.style.borderColor = '#bfdbfe'
            c++
        r++

      if multi and not selecting
        topTr = trs[Math.max(minR, startRow) - startRow]
        botTr = trs[Math.min(maxR, endRow) - startRow]
        if topTr and botTr
          topTd = topTr.children[minC]
          botTd = botTr.children[maxC]
          if topTd and botTd
            cRect = @_container.getBoundingClientRect()
            tl = topTd.getBoundingClientRect()
            br = botTd.getBoundingClientRect()
            _selBorder.style.top = "#{tl.top - cRect.top + @_container.scrollTop}px"
            _selBorder.style.left = "#{tl.left - cRect.left + @_container.scrollLeft}px"
            _selBorder.style.width = "#{br.right - tl.left}px"
            _selBorder.style.height = "#{br.bottom - tl.top}px"
            _selBorder.style.display = 'block'
          else
            _selBorder.style.display = 'none'
        else
          _selBorder.style.display = 'none'
      else
        _selBorder.style.display = 'none'
    else
      _selBorder.style.display = 'none'

    cursorRow = if selecting then anchorRow else activeRow
    cursorCol = if selecting then anchorCol else activeCol
    if cursorRow >= startRow and cursorRow <= endRow and cursorCol >= 0
      tr = trs[cursorRow - startRow]
      if tr
        td = tr.children[cursorCol]
        if td
          td.dataset.active = ''

  _removeEditor: ->
    @_container.querySelector('.rip-grid-editor')?.remove()

  openEditor: (initial, cursorEnd) ->
    if activeRow < 0 or activeCol < 0 or editing
      return
    col = @columns[activeCol]
    if col.type is 'checkbox'
      @data[sortIndex[activeRow]][col.key] = not @data[sortIndex[activeRow]][col.key]
      dataVersion++
      return
    val = @data[sortIndex[activeRow]][col.key]
    orig = String(val ?? '')
    if initial isnt undefined and col.type isnt 'select'
      editValue = initial
    else
      editValue = orig
    editing = true
    @_removeEditor()
    el = undefined
    if col.type is 'select'
      el = document.createElement('select')
      el.className = 'rip-grid-editor'
      el.style.borderRadius = '0'
      for opt in (col.source or [])
        o = document.createElement('option')
        o.value = opt
        o.textContent = opt
        o.selected = (opt is editValue)
        el.appendChild(o)
      el.addEventListener 'change', (e) =>
        editValue = e.target.value
        @commitEditor()
      el.addEventListener 'keydown', (e) => @_editorKeydown(e)
    else
      el = document.createElement('input')
      el.className = 'rip-grid-editor'
      el.type = 'text'
      el.value = editValue
      align = col.align or 'left'
      el.style.textAlign = align
      el.addEventListener 'input', (e) =>
        editValue = e.target.value
      el.addEventListener 'keydown', (e) => @_editorKeydown(e)
    @_container.appendChild(el)
    requestAnimationFrame =>
      trs = @_body.querySelectorAll('tr:not(.spacer)')
      tr = trs[activeRow - startRow]
      if tr
        td = tr.children[activeCol]
        if td
          tdRect = td.getBoundingClientRect()
          cRect = @_container.getBoundingClientRect()
          el.style.top = "#{tdRect.top - cRect.top + @_container.scrollTop}px"
          el.style.left = "#{tdRect.left - cRect.left + @_container.scrollLeft}px"
          el.style.width = "#{tdRect.width}px"
          el.style.height = "#{tdRect.height}px"
          if el.selectionStart isnt undefined
            el.selectionStart = el.value.length
            el.selectionEnd = el.value.length
          el.focus()

  commitEditor: ->
    if editing
      di = sortIndex[activeRow]
      col = @columns[activeCol]
      oldVal = @data[di][col.key]
      val = editValue
      fmt = cellFormat(di, activeCol)
      if fmt and fmt.parse
        val = fmt.parse(val)
      if @beforeEdit
        val = @beforeEdit(di, activeCol, oldVal, val)
        if val is false then return @cancelEditor()
      @data[di][col.key] = val
      dataVersion++
      editing = false
      @_removeEditor()
      @_container.focus() if @_container
      if @afterEdit
        @afterEdit(di, activeCol, oldVal, val)

  cancelEditor: ->
    editing = false
    @_removeEditor()
    anchorRow = activeRow
    anchorCol = activeCol
    @_container.focus() if @_container

  _editorKeydown: (e) ->
    numCols = @columns.length
    switch e.key
      when 'Enter'
        e.preventDefault()
        e.stopPropagation()
        @commitEditor()
        _enterCommit = true
      when 'Tab'
        e.preventDefault()
        e.stopPropagation()
        @commitEditor()
        if e.shiftKey
          if activeCol > 0
            activeCol = activeCol - 1
          else if activeRow > 0
            activeRow = activeRow - 1
            activeCol = numCols - 1
            @scrollToRow(activeRow)
        else
          if activeCol < numCols - 1
            activeCol = activeCol + 1
          else if activeRow < totalRows - 1
            activeRow = activeRow + 1
            activeCol = 0
            @scrollToRow(activeRow)
        anchorRow = activeRow
        anchorCol = activeCol
      when 'Escape'
        e.preventDefault()
        e.stopPropagation()
        @cancelEditor()

  _resizeStart: (e) ->
    e.stopPropagation()
    e.preventDefault()
    th = e.target.closest('th')
    if not th then return
    ci = th.cellIndex
    startX = e.clientX
    startW = @columns[ci].width
    handle = e.target
    handle.classList.add('active')
    colEl = @_container.querySelector("colgroup").children[ci]
    onMove = (ev) =>
      w = Math.max(40, startW + ev.clientX - startX)
      colEl.style.width = "#{w}px"
    onUp = (ev) =>
      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove)
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onUp)
      handle.classList.remove('active')
      w = Math.max(40, startW + ev.clientX - startX)
      @columns = @columns.map (c, i) -> if i is ci then Object.assign({}, c, { width: w }) else c
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove)
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp)

  _headerClick: (e) ->
    if e.target.classList.contains('resize-handle') then return
    th = e.target.closest('th')
    if not th then return
    ci = th.cellIndex
    if e.shiftKey
      existing = sortKeys.findIndex (sk) -> sk.col is ci
      if existing >= 0
        if sortKeys[existing].dir is 'asc'
          sortKeys = sortKeys.map (sk, i) -> if i is existing then { col: sk.col, dir: 'desc' } else sk
        else if sortKeys.length > 1
          sortKeys = sortKeys.map (sk, i) -> if i is existing then { col: sk.col, dir: 'asc' } else sk
        else
          sortKeys = sortKeys.filter (_, i) -> i isnt existing
      else
        sortKeys = sortKeys.concat({ col: ci, dir: 'asc' })
    else
      if sortKeys.length is 1 and sortKeys[0].col is ci
        if sortKeys[0].dir is 'asc'
          sortKeys = [{ col: ci, dir: 'desc' }]
        else
          sortKeys = []
      else
        sortKeys = [{ col: ci, dir: 'asc' }]
    dataVersion++

  onDblclick: (e) ->
    td = e.target.closest('td')
    if td and not td.parentElement.classList.contains('spacer')
      @openEditor()

  onScroll: (e) ->
    @commitEditor() if editing
    @_nextST = e.currentTarget.scrollTop
    if not @_rafPending
      @_rafPending = true
      requestAnimationFrame =>
        scrollTop = @_nextST
        @_rafPending = false

  scrollToRow: (row) ->
    el = @_container
    if el
      top = row * @rowHeight
      if top < el.scrollTop
        el.scrollTop = top
      else if top + @rowHeight + @headerHeight > el.scrollTop + containerHeight
        el.scrollTop = top + @rowHeight + @headerHeight - containerHeight

  onMousedown: (e) ->
    if e.button isnt 0
      return
    if e.target.classList.contains('rip-grid-editor')
      return
    @commitEditor() if editing
    td = e.target.closest('td')
    if td and not td.parentElement.classList.contains('spacer')
      e.preventDefault()
      @_container.focus() if @_container
      selecting = true
      el = @_container
      rect = el.getBoundingClientRect()
      ri = Math.floor((e.clientY - rect.top + el.scrollTop - @headerHeight) / @rowHeight)
      if ri >= 0 and ri < totalRows
        activeRow = ri
        activeCol = td.cellIndex
        if not e.shiftKey
          anchorRow = ri
          anchorCol = td.cellIndex

  onMouseup: (e) ->
    if selecting
      r = anchorRow; c = anchorCol
      anchorRow = activeRow; anchorCol = activeCol
      activeRow = r; activeCol = c
    selecting = false

  onMousemove: (e) ->
    if not selecting or e.buttons isnt 1
      return
    el = @_container
    rect = el.getBoundingClientRect()
    ri = Math.floor((e.clientY - rect.top + el.scrollTop - @headerHeight) / @rowHeight)
    ri = Math.max(0, Math.min(totalRows - 1, ri))
    td = e.target.closest('td')
    ci = if td and not td.parentElement.classList.contains('spacer') then td.cellIndex else activeCol
    activeRow = ri
    activeCol = ci
    @scrollToRow(ri)

  _jumpToEdge: (row, col, dr, dc) ->
    key = @columns[col]?.key
    return { row, col } unless key
    cur = @data[sortIndex[row]]?[key]
    empty = not cur? or cur is ''
    r = row + dr
    c = col + dc
    while r >= 0 and r < totalRows and c >= 0 and c < @columns.length
      k = @columns[c].key
      v = @data[sortIndex[r]]?[k]
      ve = not v? or v is ''
      if empty
        return { row: r, col: c } unless ve
      else
        if ve then return { row: r - dr, col: c - dc }
      r += dr
      c += dc
    row: Math.max(0, Math.min(totalRows - 1, r - dr))
    col: Math.max(0, Math.min(@columns.length - 1, c - dc))

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    if editing
      return
    numCols = @columns.length
    key = e.key
    _enterCommit = false if key isnt 'Enter'
    switch key
      when 'ArrowDown'
        e.preventDefault()
        if activeRow < 0
          activeRow = 0
          activeCol = 0 if activeCol < 0
        else if e.ctrlKey or e.metaKey
          pos = @_jumpToEdge(activeRow, activeCol, 1, 0)
          activeRow = pos.row
        else if activeRow < totalRows - 1
          activeRow = activeRow + 1
        @scrollToRow(activeRow)
      when 'ArrowUp'
        e.preventDefault()
        if e.ctrlKey or e.metaKey
          pos = @_jumpToEdge(activeRow, activeCol, -1, 0)
          activeRow = pos.row
          activeCol = 0 if activeCol < 0
        else if activeRow > 0
          activeRow = activeRow - 1
        @scrollToRow(activeRow)
      when 'ArrowRight'
        e.preventDefault()
        if activeCol < 0
          activeCol = 0
          activeRow = 0 if activeRow < 0
        else if e.ctrlKey or e.metaKey
          pos = @_jumpToEdge(activeRow, activeCol, 0, 1)
          activeCol = pos.col
        else if activeCol < numCols - 1
          activeCol = activeCol + 1
      when 'ArrowLeft'
        e.preventDefault()
        if e.ctrlKey or e.metaKey
          pos = @_jumpToEdge(activeRow, activeCol, 0, -1)
          activeCol = pos.col
          activeRow = 0 if activeRow < 0
        else if activeCol > 0
          activeCol = activeCol - 1
      when 'Home'
        e.preventDefault()
        if e.ctrlKey or e.metaKey
          activeRow = 0
          activeCol = 0
          @scrollToRow(0)
        else
          activeRow = 0 if activeRow < 0
          activeCol = 0
      when 'End'
        e.preventDefault()
        if e.ctrlKey or e.metaKey
          activeRow = totalRows - 1
          activeCol = numCols - 1
          @scrollToRow(activeRow)
        else
          activeRow = 0 if activeRow < 0
          activeCol = numCols - 1
      when 'Tab'
        e.preventDefault()
        if activeRow < 0 or activeCol < 0
          activeRow = 0
          activeCol = 0
        else if e.shiftKey
          if activeCol > 0
            activeCol = activeCol - 1
          else if activeRow > 0
            activeRow = activeRow - 1
            activeCol = numCols - 1
            @scrollToRow(activeRow)
        else
          if activeCol < numCols - 1
            activeCol = activeCol + 1
          else if activeRow < totalRows - 1
            activeRow = activeRow + 1
            activeCol = 0
            @scrollToRow(activeRow)
      when 'Enter'
        e.preventDefault()
        if activeRow < 0 or activeCol < 0
          activeRow = 0
          activeCol = 0
        else if _enterCommit
          _enterCommit = false
          if e.shiftKey
            if activeRow > 0
              activeRow = activeRow - 1
              anchorRow = activeRow
              @scrollToRow(activeRow)
          else
            if activeRow < totalRows - 1
              activeRow = activeRow + 1
              anchorRow = activeRow
              @scrollToRow(activeRow)
          @openEditor()
          return
        else
          @openEditor()
          return
      when 'F2'
        e.preventDefault()
        if activeRow >= 0 and activeCol >= 0
          @openEditor(undefined, true)
        return
      when 'PageDown'
        e.preventDefault()
        rows = Math.floor(containerHeight / @rowHeight)
        activeRow = Math.min(totalRows - 1, activeRow + rows)
        activeCol = 0 if activeCol < 0
        @scrollToRow(activeRow)
      when 'PageUp'
        e.preventDefault()
        rows = Math.floor(containerHeight / @rowHeight)
        activeRow = Math.max(0, activeRow - rows)
        activeCol = 0 if activeCol < 0
        @scrollToRow(activeRow)
      when 'Escape'
        if anchorRow isnt activeRow or anchorCol isnt activeCol
          anchorRow = activeRow
          anchorCol = activeCol
        else
          activeRow = -1
          activeCol = -1
          anchorRow = -1
          anchorCol = -1
        return
      when ' '
        if activeRow >= 0 and activeCol >= 0
          col = @columns[activeCol]
          if col.type is 'checkbox'
            e.preventDefault()
            @data[sortIndex[activeRow]][col.key] = not @data[sortIndex[activeRow]][col.key]
            dataVersion++
        return
      when 'Delete', 'Backspace'
        if activeRow >= 0 and activeCol >= 0 and not e.ctrlKey and not e.metaKey
          e.preventDefault()
          col = @columns[activeCol]
          if col.type is 'checkbox'
            @data[sortIndex[activeRow]][col.key] = false
          else
            fmt = cellFormat(sortIndex[activeRow], activeCol)
            @data[sortIndex[activeRow]][col.key] = if fmt and fmt.parse then fmt.parse('') else ''
          dataVersion++
        return
      when 'a'
        if e.ctrlKey or e.metaKey
          e.preventDefault()
          anchorRow = 0
          anchorCol = 0
          activeRow = totalRows - 1
          activeCol = numCols - 1
        return
      when 'c'
        if (e.ctrlKey or e.metaKey) and activeRow >= 0 and activeCol >= 0
          e.preventDefault()
          @copySelection()
        return
      when 'v'
        if e.ctrlKey or e.metaKey
          e.preventDefault()
          @pasteAtActive()
        return
      when 'x'
        if (e.ctrlKey or e.metaKey) and activeRow >= 0 and activeCol >= 0
          e.preventDefault()
          @cutSelection()
        return
      else
        if key.length is 1 and not e.ctrlKey and not e.metaKey and not e.altKey
          if activeRow >= 0 and activeCol >= 0
            ct = @columns[activeCol].type
            if ct isnt 'checkbox' and ct isnt 'select'
              e.preventDefault()
              @openEditor(key)
        return

    extending = e.shiftKey and key isnt 'Tab' and key isnt 'Enter'
    if not extending
      anchorRow = activeRow
      anchorCol = activeCol

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Clipboard — copy, cut, paste via navigator.clipboard (TSV format)
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------

  _selectionBounds: ->
    minR = Math.min(anchorRow, activeRow)
    maxR = Math.max(anchorRow, activeRow)
    minC = Math.min(anchorCol, activeCol)
    maxC = Math.max(anchorCol, activeCol)
    { minR, maxR, minC, maxC }

  _selectionToTSV: ->
    { minR, maxR, minC, maxC } = @_selectionBounds()
    lines = []
    r = minR
    while r <= maxR
      di = sortIndex[r]
      row = @data[di]
      cells = []
      c = minC
      while c <= maxC
        v = row[@columns[c].key]
        s = if v? then String(v) else ''
        if s.includes('\t') or s.includes('\n') or s.includes('"')
          s = '"' + s.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"'
        cells.push(s)
        c++
      lines.push(cells.join('\t'))
      r++
    lines.join('\n')

  _parseTSV: (text) ->
    rows = []
    lines = text.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').replace(/\r/g, '\n').split('\n')
    for line, li in lines
      continue if line is '' and li is lines.length - 1
      if line.includes('"')
        cells = []
        i = 0
        while i < line.length
          if line[i] is '"'
            j = i + 1
            val = ''
            while j < line.length
              if line[j] is '"'
                if line[j + 1] is '"'
                  val += '"'
                  j += 2
                else
                  j++
                  break
              else
                val += line[j]
                j++
            cells.push(val)
            i = j + 1
          else
            j = line.indexOf('\t', i)
            if j is -1
              cells.push(line.slice(i))
              break
            else
              cells.push(line.slice(i, j))
              i = j + 1
        rows.push(cells)
      else
        rows.push(line.split('\t'))
    rows

  copySelection: ->
    return if activeRow < 0 or activeCol < 0
    tsv = @_selectionToTSV()
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(tsv) if navigator.clipboard

  cutSelection: ->
    return if activeRow < 0 or activeCol < 0
    @copySelection()
    { minR, maxR, minC, maxC } = @_selectionBounds()
    r = minR
    while r <= maxR
      di = sortIndex[r]
      c = minC
      while c <= maxC
        col = @columns[c]
        if col.type is 'checkbox'
          @data[di][col.key] = false
        else
          fmt = cellFormat(di, c)
          @data[di][col.key] = if fmt and fmt.parse then fmt.parse('') else ''
        c++
      r++
    dataVersion++

  pasteAtActive: ->
    return if activeRow < 0 or activeCol < 0
    return unless navigator.clipboard
    navigator.clipboard.readText().then (text) =>
      return unless text
      rows = @_parseTSV(text)
      return unless rows.length
      numCols = @columns.length
      r = 0
      while r < rows.length
        ri = activeRow + r
        break if ri >= totalRows
        di = sortIndex[ri]
        c = 0
        while c < rows[r].length
          ci = activeCol + c
          break if ci >= numCols
          col = @columns[ci]
          val = rows[r][c]
          if col.type is 'checkbox'
            @data[di][col.key] = val is 'true' or val is '1' or val is 'yes'
          else
            fmt = cellFormat(di, ci)
            @data[di][col.key] = if fmt and fmt.parse then fmt.parse(val) else val
          c++
        r++
      dataVersion++

  # Public API
  getCell: (row, col) -> @data[row][@columns[col].key]
  setCell: (row, col, value) -> @data[row][@columns[col].key] = value; dataVersion++
  getData: -> @data
  setData: (d) -> @data = d; dataVersion++
  sort: (col, dir) -> sortKeys = if dir then [{ col, dir }] else []; dataVersion++

  mounted: ->
    _topSpacer = @_createSpacer()
    _botSpacer = @_createSpacer()
    _ready = true
    if @_container
      handler = (entries) =>
        for entry in entries
          containerHeight = entry.contentRect.height
      @_resizeObs = new ResizeObserver(handler)
      @_resizeObs.observe(@_container)

  unmounted: ->
    if @_resizeObs
      @_resizeObs.disconnect()

  render
    div.grid-container ref: "_container", role: "grid", tabIndex: 0,
      $editing: editing?!,
      $selecting: selecting?!
      table.rip-grid
        colgroup
          for c in @columns
            col style: "width: #{c.width}px"
        thead
          tr @click: @_headerClick
            for c, ci in @columns
              th style: "text-align: #{c.align or 'left'}; cursor: pointer",
                $sorted: (if sortInfo.arrows[ci] then (if sortInfo.arrows[ci].includes('↓') then 'asc' else 'desc') else undefined)
                = c.title
                span.sort-arrow
                  sortInfo.arrows[ci]
                if sortKeys.length > 1 and sortInfo.ranks[ci] > 0
                  span.sort-badge
                    "#{sortInfo.ranks[ci]}"
                span.resize-handle @mousedown: @_resizeStart
        tbody ref: "_body"
components.components/preview-card.rip:
# PreviewCard — accessible headless hover preview card
#
# Shows a floating card on hover/focus of a trigger element. Dismisses
# on mouse leave or blur. Uses native `popover="hint"` for top-layer behavior.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   PreviewCard delay: 400
#     a $trigger: true, href: "/user/42", "View Profile"
#     div $content: true
#       p "User details here..."

export PreviewCard = component
  @delay:: number := 400
  @closeDelay:: number := 200

  open := false
  _ready := false
  _openTimer := null
  _closeTimer := null
  _id =! "pc-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  beforeUnmount: ->
    clearTimeout _openTimer if _openTimer
    clearTimeout _closeTimer if _closeTimer

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true
    trigger = @_root?.querySelector('[data-trigger]')
    floating = @_root?.querySelector('[data-content]')
    return unless trigger and floating
    floating.id = _id
    floating.setAttribute 'popover', 'hint'
    trigger.setAttribute 'aria-controls', _id
    trigger.setAttribute 'aria-expanded', false
    trigger.addEventListener 'mouseenter', =>
      clearTimeout _closeTimer if _closeTimer
      _openTimer = setTimeout (=> open = true), @delay
    trigger.addEventListener 'mouseleave', =>
      clearTimeout _openTimer if _openTimer
      _closeTimer = setTimeout (=> open = false), @closeDelay
    @_applyPlacement()
    trigger.addEventListener 'focus', =>
      clearTimeout _closeTimer if _closeTimer
      _openTimer = setTimeout (=> open = true; @_applyPlacement()), @delay
    trigger.addEventListener 'blur', =>
      clearTimeout _openTimer if _openTimer
      _closeTimer = setTimeout (=> open = false), @closeDelay

  _applyPlacement: ->
    trigger = @_root?.querySelector('[data-trigger]')
    floating = @_root?.querySelector('[data-content]')
    ARIA.position trigger, floating, placement: 'bottom start', offset: 4

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    trigger = @_root?.querySelector('[data-trigger]')
    floating = @_root?.querySelector('[data-content]')
    return unless floating and trigger
    trigger.setAttribute 'aria-expanded', !!open
    floating.hidden = not open
    if open then floating.removeAttribute 'aria-hidden' else floating.setAttribute 'aria-hidden', 'true'
    @_applyPlacement()
    if open then floating.setAttribute('data-open', '') else floating.removeAttribute('data-open')
    ARIA.bindPopover open, (=> floating), ((isOpen) => open = isOpen), (=> trigger)
    if open
      onEnter = => clearTimeout _closeTimer if _closeTimer
      onLeave = => _closeTimer = setTimeout (=> open = false), @closeDelay
      floating.addEventListener 'mouseenter', onEnter
      floating.addEventListener 'mouseleave', onLeave
      return ->
        floating.removeEventListener 'mouseenter', onEnter
        floating.removeEventListener 'mouseleave', onLeave

  render
    div ref: "_root"
      slot
components.components/field.rip:
# Field — accessible headless form field wrapper
#
# Associates a label, description, and error message with a form control.
# Generates linked IDs for aria-labelledby/describedby/errormessage.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Field label: "Email", error: errors.email
#     Input value <=> email, type: "email"

export Field = component
  @label:: string := ""
  @description:: string := ""
  @error:: string := ""
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @required:: boolean := false

  _id =! "fld-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  mounted: ->
    ctrl = @_root?.querySelector('input, select, textarea, button, [role]')
    if ctrl
      ctrl.setAttribute 'aria-labelledby', "#{_id}-label" if @label
      ctrl.setAttribute 'aria-describedby', "#{_id}-desc" if @description
      ctrl.setAttribute 'aria-errormessage', "#{_id}-err" if @error
      ctrl.setAttribute 'aria-invalid', true if @error
      ctrl.setAttribute 'aria-required', true if @required

  ~>
    ctrl = @_root?.querySelector('input, select, textarea, button, [role]')
    return unless ctrl
    if @error
      ctrl.setAttribute 'aria-invalid', true
      ctrl.setAttribute 'aria-errormessage', "#{_id}-err"
    else
      ctrl.removeAttribute 'aria-invalid'
      ctrl.removeAttribute 'aria-errormessage'

  render
    div $disabled: @disabled?!, $invalid: @error?!
      if @label
        label id: "#{_id}-label", $label: true
          @label
          if @required
            span $required: true, aria-hidden: "true"
              " *"
      slot
      if @description and not @error
        div id: "#{_id}-desc", $description: true
          @description
      if @error
        div id: "#{_id}-err", role: "alert", $error: true
          @error
components.components/toolbar.rip:
# Toolbar — accessible headless toolbar
#
# Groups interactive controls with roving tabindex keyboard navigation.
# Arrow keys move focus between focusable children. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Toolbar
#     Button @click: save, "Save"
#     Button @click: undo, "Undo"
#     Separator orientation: "vertical"
#     Toggle pressed <=> isBold, "Bold"

export Toolbar = component
  @orientation:: "horizontal" | "vertical" := "horizontal"
  @label:: string := ""

  _getFocusable: ->
    return [] unless @_root
    Array.from(@_root.querySelectorAll('button, [tabindex], input, select, textarea')).filter (el) ->
      not el.disabled and el.offsetParent isnt null

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    els = @_getFocusable()
    return unless els.length
    focused = els.indexOf(document.activeElement)
    return if focused < 0
    len = els.length
    ARIA.rovingNav e, {
      next:  => els[(focused + 1) %% len]?.focus()
      prev:  => els[(focused - 1) %% len]?.focus()
      first: => els[0]?.focus()
      last:  => els[len - 1]?.focus()
    }, @orientation

  render
    div role: "toolbar", aria-label: @label or undefined, aria-orientation: @orientation
      $orientation: @orientation
      slot
components.components/combobox.rip:
# Combobox — accessible headless combobox (input + filterable listbox)
#
# Keyboard: ArrowDown/Up to navigate, Enter to select, Escape to close,
#           typing filters the list via the @filter callback.
#
# Exposes $open on the wrapper, $highlighted on options.
# Ships zero CSS — style entirely via attribute selectors in your stylesheet.
#
# Usage:
#   Combobox query <=> searchText, items: fruits, @select: handleSelect, @filter: filterFn

export Combobox = component
  @query:: string := ""
  @items:: any[] := []
  @placeholder:: string := "Search..."
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @autoHighlight:: boolean := true

  open := false
  highlightedIndex := -1
  _ready := false
  _popupGuard =! ARIA.popupGuard()
  _listId =! "cb-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  getItems: ->
    return [] unless @_list
    Array.from(@_list.querySelectorAll('[role="option"]'))

  _scrollToItem: ->
    @getItems()[highlightedIndex]?.scrollIntoView({ block: 'nearest' })

  clear: ->
    @query = ''
    highlightedIndex = -1
    @emit 'filter', ''

  onInput: (e) ->
    @query = e.target.value
    open = true
    highlightedIndex = if @autoHighlight and @items.length > 0 then 0 else -1
    @emit 'filter', @query

  onFocusin: ->
    return unless _popupGuard.canOpen()
    @openMenu()

  onInputClick: ->
    return if @disabled or open
    @openMenu(true)

  onFocusout: ->
    setTimeout => @close(false, true) unless @_content?.contains(document.activeElement), 0

  openMenu: (force = false) ->
    return unless force or _popupGuard.canOpen()
    open = true
    highlightedIndex = -1
    @_input?.focus()

  close: (restoreFocus = true, blockOpen = false) ->
    open = false
    highlightedIndex = -1
    _popupGuard.block() if blockOpen
    @_input?.focus() if restoreFocus

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true

  _applyPlacement: ->
    ARIA.position @_content, @_list, placement: 'bottom start', offset: 2, matchWidth: true

  isDisabled: (item) -> item?.hasAttribute?('data-disabled')

  selectIndex: (idx) ->
    item = @getItems()[idx]
    return unless item
    return if @isDisabled(item)
    val = item.dataset.value ?? item.textContent.trim()
    @query = val
    @emit 'select', val
    @close(true, true)

  _nextEnabled: (from, dir) ->
    opts = @getItems()
    len = opts.length
    i = from
    loop len
      i = (i + dir) %% len
      return i unless @isDisabled(opts[i])
    from

  _onKeydown: (e) ->
    len = @getItems().length
    ARIA.listNav e,
      next:    => @openMenu() unless open; highlightedIndex = @_nextEnabled(highlightedIndex,  1); @_scrollToItem()
      prev:    => @openMenu() unless open; highlightedIndex = @_nextEnabled(highlightedIndex, -1); @_scrollToItem()
      first:   => highlightedIndex = 0;       @_scrollToItem()
      last:    => highlightedIndex = len - 1; @_scrollToItem()
      select:  => if highlightedIndex >= 0 then @selectIndex(highlightedIndex) else if len is 1 then @selectIndex(0)
      dismiss: => if open then @close() else @query = ''
      tab:     => @close(false, true)

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    if @_list
      @_applyPlacement()
    ARIA.bindPopover open, (=> @_list), ((isOpen) => open = isOpen), (=> @_input)
    ARIA.popupDismiss open, (=> @_list), (=> @close(false, true)), [=> @_input, => @_content]

  render
    . ref: "_content", $open: open?!

      # Text input
      . style: "position:relative;display:inline-flex;align-items:center"
        input ref: "_input", role: "combobox"
          type: "text"
          autocomplete: "off"
          aria-expanded: !!open
          aria-haspopup: "listbox"
          aria-autocomplete: "list"
          aria-controls: if open then _listId else undefined
          aria-activedescendant: if highlightedIndex >= 0 then "#{_listId}-#{highlightedIndex}" else undefined
          $disabled: @disabled?!
          disabled: @disabled
          placeholder: @placeholder
          value: @query
          @click: @onInputClick
          @keydown: @_onKeydown
        if @query
          button aria-label: "Clear", $clear: true, @click: @clear
            "✕"

      # Listbox
      div ref: "_list"
        id: _listId
        role: "listbox"
        popover: "auto"
        hidden: not open
        aria-hidden: (open ? undefined : "true")
        style: "position:fixed;margin:0;inset:auto"
        $open: open?!
        for item, idx in @items
          div role: "option", tabIndex: -1, id: "#{_listId}-#{idx}"
            $value: item
            $highlighted: (idx is highlightedIndex)?!
            @click: (=> @selectIndex(idx))
            @mouseenter: (=> highlightedIndex = idx)
            "#{item}"
        if @items.length is 0 and @query
          div role: "status", aria-live: "polite", $empty: true
            "No results"
components.components/tooltip.rip:
# Tooltip — accessible headless tooltip with delay and positioning
#
# Shows on hover/focus with configurable delay. Uses aria-describedby and
# native `popover="hint"` for top-layer behavior.
# Exposes $open, $entering, $exiting. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Tooltip text: "Helpful info", placement: "top"
#     button "Hover me"

lastCloseTime = 0
GROUP_TIMEOUT = 400

export Tooltip = component
  @text:: string := ""
  @placement:: "top" | "top-start" | "top-end" | "bottom" | "bottom-start" | "bottom-end" | "left" | "right" := "top"
  @delay:: number := 300
  @offset:: number := 6
  @hoverable:: boolean := false

  open := false
  entering := false
  exiting := false
  _showTimer := null
  _hideTimer := null
  _ready := false
  _id =! "tip-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  _applyPlacement: ->
    [side, align] = @placement.split('-')
    align ??= 'center'
    ARIA.position @_trigger, @_tip, placement: "#{side} #{align}", offset: @offset

  show: ->
    clearTimeout _hideTimer if _hideTimer
    delay = if (Date.now() - lastCloseTime) < GROUP_TIMEOUT then 0 else @delay
    _showTimer = setTimeout =>
      open = true
      entering = true
      setTimeout =>
        entering = false
      , 0
    , delay

  hide: ->
    clearTimeout _showTimer if _showTimer
    exiting = true
    _hideTimer = setTimeout =>
      open = false
      exiting = false
      lastCloseTime = Date.now()
    , 150

  _cancelHide: ->
    clearTimeout _hideTimer if _hideTimer
    exiting = false

  beforeUnmount: ->
    clearTimeout _showTimer if _showTimer
    clearTimeout _hideTimer if _hideTimer

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    if @_tip
      @_tip.setAttribute 'popover', 'hint'
      @_applyPlacement()
      if open then @_tip.setAttribute('data-open', '') else @_tip.removeAttribute('data-open')
      ARIA.bindPopover open, (=> @_tip), ((isOpen) => open = isOpen), (=> @_trigger)

  render
    .
      div ref: "_trigger"
        aria-describedby: open ? _id : undefined
        @mouseenter: @show
        @mouseleave: @hide
        @focusin: @show
        @focusout: @hide
        slot

      div ref: "_tip"
        id: _id
        role: "tooltip"
        popover: "hint"
        hidden: not open
        aria-hidden: (open ? undefined : "true")
        style: "position:fixed;margin:0;inset:auto"
        $open: open?!
        $entering: entering?!
        $exiting: exiting?!
        $placement: @placement
        @mouseenter: (=> @_cancelHide() if @hoverable)
        @mouseleave: (=> @hide() if @hoverable)
        @text
components.components/label.rip:
# Label — accessible headless form label
#
# Standalone label element that associates with a form control via @for.
# Companions Field but works independently. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Label for: "email-input", "Email address"
#   Label required: true, "Username"

export Label = component
  @for:: any := null
  @required:: boolean := false

  render
    label for: @for?!, $required: @required?!
      slot
components.components/resizable.rip:
# Resizable — accessible headless resizable panels
#
# Container with draggable handles between panels for resizing.
# Panel sizes are stored as percentages and exposed via CSS
# custom properties. Place [data-handle] elements between [data-panel]
# elements. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Resizable
#     div $panel: true
#       p "Left panel"
#     div $handle: true
#     div $panel: true
#       p "Right panel"
#
#   Resizable orientation: "vertical", minSize: 20
#     div $panel: true, "Top"
#     div $handle: true
#     div $panel: true, "Bottom"

export Resizable = component
  @orientation:: "horizontal" | "vertical" := "horizontal"
  @minSize:: number := 10
  @maxSize:: number := 90

  _ready := false
  _dragging = null
  _startPos = 0
  _startSizes = []
  sizes := []

  _panels: ->
    return [] unless @_root
    Array.from(@_root.querySelectorAll(':scope > [data-panel]') or [])

  _handles: ->
    return [] unless @_root
    Array.from(@_root.querySelectorAll(':scope > [data-handle]') or [])

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true
    panels = @_panels()
    count = panels.length
    if count and not sizes.length
      even = 100 / count
      sizes = Array.from {length: count}, -> even

    @_handles().forEach (handle, idx) =>
      handle.setAttribute 'role', 'separator'
      handle.setAttribute 'tabindex', '0'
      handle.addEventListener 'pointerdown', (e) => @_onPointerDown(idx, e)
      handle.addEventListener 'keydown', (e) => @_onKeydown(idx, e)

  _getPos: (e) ->
    if @orientation is 'horizontal' then e.clientX else e.clientY

  _getContainerSize: ->
    rect = @_root?.getBoundingClientRect()
    return 0 unless rect
    if @orientation is 'horizontal' then rect.width else rect.height

  _onPointerDown: (handleIdx, e) ->
    e.preventDefault()
    _dragging = handleIdx
    _startPos = @_getPos(e)
    _startSizes = [...sizes]
    e.target.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
    e.target.toggleAttribute 'data-dragging', true

  _onPointerMove: (e) ->
    return unless _dragging?
    total = @_getContainerSize()
    return unless total
    delta = @_getPos(e) - _startPos
    pctDelta = (delta / total) * 100
    @_applyResize(_dragging, _startSizes[_dragging] + pctDelta, _startSizes[_dragging + 1] - pctDelta)

  _onPointerUp: (e) ->
    return unless _dragging?
    handle = @_handles()[_dragging]
    handle?.removeAttribute 'data-dragging'
    _dragging = null
    @emit 'resize', sizes

  _applyResize: (idx, newLeft, newRight) ->
    newLeft  = Math.max(@minSize, Math.min(@maxSize, newLeft))
    newRight = Math.max(@minSize, Math.min(@maxSize, newRight))
    combined = sizes[idx] + sizes[idx + 1]
    newRight = combined - newLeft
    return if newRight < @minSize or newRight > @maxSize
    updated = [...sizes]
    updated[idx] = newLeft
    updated[idx + 1] = newRight
    sizes = updated

  _onKeydown: (handleIdx, e) ->
    step = 10
    horiz = @orientation is 'horizontal'
    delta = switch e.key
      when (if horiz then 'ArrowRight' else 'ArrowDown') then step
      when (if horiz then 'ArrowLeft' else 'ArrowUp') then -step
      else null
    return unless delta?
    e.preventDefault()
    @_applyResize(handleIdx, sizes[handleIdx] + delta, sizes[handleIdx + 1] - delta)
    @emit 'resize', sizes

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    @_panels().forEach (el, idx) =>
      pct = sizes[idx] or 0
      el.style.setProperty '--panel-size', "#{pct}%"
      el.style.flexBasis = "#{pct}%"
    @_handles().forEach (handle, idx) =>
      handle.setAttribute 'aria-valuenow', Math.round(sizes[idx] or 0)
      handle.setAttribute 'aria-orientation', @orientation

  render
    div ref: "_root", $orientation: @orientation
      @pointermove: @_onPointerMove
      @pointerup: @_onPointerUp
      style: "display:flex; flex-direction:#{if @orientation is 'horizontal' then 'row' else 'column'}"
      slot
components.components/scroll-area.rip:
# ScrollArea — accessible headless custom scrollbar
#
# Renders custom scrollbar thumb that tracks scroll position. Thumb is
# draggable and the track is clickable. Auto-hides when not scrolling.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   ScrollArea
#     div "Long scrollable content..."

MIN_THUMB = 20

export ScrollArea = component
  @orientation:: "horizontal" | "vertical" := "vertical"

  hovering := false
  scrolling := false
  _scrollTimer = null
  _dragStart = 0
  _dragScrollStart = 0
  _dragging = false
  _ready := false

  _updateThumb: ->
    vp = @_viewport
    sb = @_scrollbar
    th = @_thumb
    return unless vp and sb and th
    vert = @orientation is 'vertical'

    vpSize = if vert then vp.clientHeight else vp.clientWidth
    scSize = if vert then vp.scrollHeight else vp.scrollWidth
    sbSize = if vert then sb.clientHeight else sb.clientWidth
    scrollPos = if vert then vp.scrollTop else vp.scrollLeft

    ratio = vpSize / (scSize or 1)
    if ratio >= 1
      th.style.display = 'none'
      return
    th.style.display = ''

    thumbPx = Math.max(MIN_THUMB, sbSize * ratio)
    scrollRange = scSize - vpSize
    maxOffset = sbSize - thumbPx
    posPx = if scrollRange > 0 then Math.min(maxOffset, Math.max(0, (scrollPos / scrollRange) * maxOffset)) else 0

    if vert
      th.style.height = "#{thumbPx}px"
      th.style.transform = "translate3d(0,#{posPx}px,0)"
    else
      th.style.width = "#{thumbPx}px"
      th.style.transform = "translate3d(#{posPx}px,0,0)"

  _onScroll: ->
    scrolling = true
    clearTimeout _scrollTimer if _scrollTimer
    _scrollTimer = setTimeout (-> scrolling = false), 800
    @_updateThumb()

  _onTrackClick: (e) ->
    return if e.target is @_thumb
    vp = @_viewport
    sb = @_scrollbar
    th = @_thumb
    return unless vp and sb and th
    vert = @orientation is 'vertical'
    rect = sb.getBoundingClientRect()
    thumbPx = if vert then th.offsetHeight else th.offsetWidth

    if vert
      clickPos = e.clientY - rect.top - thumbPx / 2
      maxOffset = rect.height - thumbPx
      ratio = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, clickPos / maxOffset))
      vp.scrollTop = ratio * (vp.scrollHeight - vp.clientHeight)
    else
      clickPos = e.clientX - rect.left - thumbPx / 2
      maxOffset = rect.width - thumbPx
      ratio = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, clickPos / maxOffset))
      vp.scrollLeft = ratio * (vp.scrollWidth - vp.clientWidth)

  _onThumbDown: (e) ->
    return if e.button isnt 0
    e.preventDefault()
    e.stopPropagation()
    _dragging = true
    if @orientation is 'vertical'
      _dragStart = e.clientY
      _dragScrollStart = @_viewport.scrollTop
    else
      _dragStart = e.clientX
      _dragScrollStart = @_viewport.scrollLeft
    @_thumb.setPointerCapture e.pointerId

  _onThumbMove: (e) ->
    return unless _dragging
    vp = @_viewport
    sb = @_scrollbar
    th = @_thumb
    return unless vp and sb and th
    vert = @orientation is 'vertical'
    thumbPx = if vert then th.offsetHeight else th.offsetWidth
    sbSize = if vert then sb.clientHeight else sb.clientWidth
    maxOffset = sbSize - thumbPx
    return if maxOffset <= 0

    delta = if vert then e.clientY - _dragStart else e.clientX - _dragStart
    scrollRange = if vert then vp.scrollHeight - vp.clientHeight else vp.scrollWidth - vp.clientWidth
    newPos = _dragScrollStart + (delta / maxOffset) * scrollRange

    if vert then vp.scrollTop = newPos else vp.scrollLeft = newPos

  _onThumbUp: (e) ->
    _dragging = false
    @_thumb.releasePointerCapture e.pointerId

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true
    requestAnimationFrame => @_updateThumb()
    if @_viewport
      @_resizeObs = new ResizeObserver => @_updateThumb()
      @_resizeObs.observe @_viewport
      @_resizeObs.observe @_viewport.firstElementChild if @_viewport.firstElementChild

  beforeUnmount: ->
    @_resizeObs?.disconnect()

  render
    div $orientation: @orientation
      $hovering: hovering?!
      $scrolling: scrolling?!
      $dragging: _dragging?!
      @mouseenter: (=> hovering = true)
      @mouseleave: (=> hovering = false)

      div ref: "_viewport", $viewport: true
        style: "overflow:scroll;scrollbar-width:none"
        @scroll: @_onScroll
        slot

      div ref: "_scrollbar", $scrollbar: true
        @click: @_onTrackClick
        div ref: "_thumb", $thumb: true
          @pointerdown: @_onThumbDown
          @pointermove: @_onThumbMove
          @pointerup: @_onThumbUp
components.components/drawer.rip:
# Drawer — accessible headless slide-out panel
#
# A Dialog variant that slides from an edge of the screen.
# Supports dismiss on escape, click-outside, and optional swipe-to-close.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Drawer open <=> showDrawer, side: "right"
#     h2 "Settings"
#     p "Panel content here"

export Drawer = component
  @open:: boolean := false
  @side:: "top" | "right" | "bottom" | "left" := "right"
  @dismissable:: boolean := true

  _prevFocus = null
  _id =! "drw-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  ~>
    ARIA.bindDialog @open, (=> @_dialog), ((isOpen) =>
      if not isOpen and @open
        @open = false
        @emit 'close'
    ), @dismissable

  ~>
    if @open
      _prevFocus = document.activeElement
      ARIA.lockScroll(this)
      requestAnimationFrame =>
        panel = @_dialog
        if panel
          ARIA.wireAria panel, _id
          panel.querySelectorAll('a[href],button:not([disabled]),input:not([disabled]),select:not([disabled]),textarea:not([disabled]),[tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])')?[0]?.focus()
      return ->
        ARIA.unlockScroll(this)
        _prevFocus?.focus()

  close: ->
    @open = false
    @emit 'close'

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    if e.key is 'Escape' and @dismissable
      e.preventDefault()
      @close()

  onBackdropClick: (e) ->
    if e.target is e.currentTarget and @dismissable
      @_dialog?.close()

  render
    dialog ref: "_dialog"
      hidden: not @open
      aria-hidden: (@open ? undefined : "true")
      $open: @open?!
      $side: @side
      @click: @onBackdropClick
      @keydown: @onKeydown
      $side: @side
      slot
components.components/accordion.rip:
# Accordion — accessible headless expand/collapse widget
#
# Supports single or multiple expanded sections. Keyboard: Enter/Space to
# toggle, ArrowDown/Up to move between triggers. Exposes $open on items.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Accordion multiple: false
#     div $item: "a"
#       button $trigger: true, "Section A"
#       div $content: true
#         p "Content A"
#     div $item: "b"
#       button $trigger: true, "Section B"
#       div $content: true
#         p "Content B"

export Accordion = component
  @multiple:: boolean := false

  openItems := new Set()
  _ready    := false
  _id =! "acc-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true
    @_content?.querySelectorAll('[data-trigger]').forEach (trigger) =>
      item = trigger.closest('[data-item]')
      return unless item
      id = item.dataset.item
      trigger.addEventListener 'click', =>
        return if item.hasAttribute('data-disabled')
        @toggle(id)
      trigger.addEventListener 'keydown', (e) => @onTriggerKeydown(e, id)

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    @_content?.querySelectorAll('[data-item]').forEach (item) =>
      id = item.dataset.item
      isOpen = openItems.has(id)
      item.toggleAttribute 'data-open', isOpen
      trigger = item.querySelector('[data-trigger]')
      content = item.querySelector('[data-content]')
      triggerId = "#{_id}-trigger-#{id}"
      panelId   = "#{_id}-panel-#{id}"
      if trigger
        isDisabled = item.hasAttribute('data-disabled')
        trigger.id = triggerId
        trigger.setAttribute 'aria-expanded', isOpen
        trigger.setAttribute 'aria-controls', panelId
        if isDisabled then trigger.setAttribute 'aria-disabled', true else trigger.removeAttribute 'aria-disabled'
        trigger.tabIndex = if isDisabled then -1 else 0
      if content
        content.id = panelId
        content.hidden = if isOpen then false else 'until-found'
        content.setAttribute 'role', 'region'
        content.setAttribute 'aria-labelledby', triggerId
        if isOpen
          rect = content.getBoundingClientRect()
          content.style.setProperty '--accordion-panel-height', "#{rect.height}px"
          content.style.setProperty '--accordion-panel-width', "#{rect.width}px"

  toggle: (id) ->
    if openItems.has(id)
      openItems.delete(id)
    else
      openItems.clear() unless @multiple
      openItems.add(id)
    openItems = new Set(openItems)
    @emit 'change', Array.from(openItems)

  isOpen: (id) ->
    openItems.has(id)

  onTriggerKeydown: (e, id) ->
    disabled = e.currentTarget.closest('[data-item]')?.hasAttribute('data-disabled')
    ARIA.rovingNav e, {
      next:   => @_focusNext(1)
      prev:   => @_focusNext(-1)
      first:  => @_focusTrigger(0)
      last:   => @_focusTrigger(-1)
      select: => @toggle(id) unless disabled
    }, 'vertical'

  _triggers: ->
    return [] unless @_content
    Array.from(@_content.querySelectorAll('[data-trigger]'))

  _focusNext: (dir) ->
    triggers = @_triggers()
    idx = triggers.indexOf(document.activeElement)
    return if idx is -1
    next = (idx + dir) %% triggers.length
    triggers[next]?.focus()

  _focusTrigger: (idx) ->
    triggers = @_triggers()
    target = if idx < 0 then triggers[triggers.length - 1] else triggers[idx]
    target?.focus()

  render
    div ref: "_content"
      slot
components.components/pagination.rip:
# Pagination — accessible headless page navigation
#
# Renders page buttons with prev/next and ellipsis gaps.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Pagination page <=> currentPage, total: 100, perPage: 10
#   Pagination page <=> currentPage, total: 500, perPage: 20, siblingCount: 2

export Pagination = component
  @page:: number := 1
  @total:: number := 0
  @perPage:: number := 10
  @siblingCount:: number := 1

  totalPages ~= Math.max(1, Math.ceil(@total / @perPage))
  _ready := false

  _range: (start, fin) ->
    len = fin - start + 1
    Array.from {length: len}, (_, i) -> start + i

  visiblePages ~=
    tp = totalPages
    sibs = @siblingCount
    current = @page

    totalNumbers = sibs * 2 + 5
    return @_range(1, tp) if tp <= totalNumbers

    leftSib  = Math.max(current - sibs, 1)
    rightSib = Math.min(current + sibs, tp)

    showLeftDots  = leftSib > 2
    showRightDots = rightSib < tp - 1

    if not showLeftDots and showRightDots
      leftCount = 3 + 2 * sibs
      leftRange = @_range(1, leftCount)
      return [...leftRange, -1, tp]

    if showLeftDots and not showRightDots
      rightCount = 3 + 2 * sibs
      rightRange = @_range(tp - rightCount + 1, tp)
      return [1, -2, ...rightRange]

    midRange = @_range(leftSib, rightSib)
    [1, -2, ...midRange, -1, tp]

  goto: (pg) ->
    pg = Math.max(1, Math.min(pg, totalPages))
    return if pg is @page
    @page = pg
    @emit 'change', @page

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    switch e.key
      when 'ArrowLeft'
        e.preventDefault()
        @goto(@page - 1)
      when 'ArrowRight'
        e.preventDefault()
        @goto(@page + 1)
      when 'Home'
        e.preventDefault()
        @goto(1)
      when 'End'
        e.preventDefault()
        @goto(totalPages)

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true

  _prevPages = null

  _rebuild: (inner) ->
    frag = document.createDocumentFragment()
    for pg in visiblePages
      if pg < 0
        el = document.createElement 'span'
        el.setAttribute 'data-ellipsis', ''
        el.textContent = '...'
      else
        el = document.createElement 'button'
        el.setAttribute 'aria-label', "Page #{pg}"
        el.setAttribute 'data-page', ''
        el.textContent = "#{pg}"
        el.addEventListener 'click', => @goto(pg)
      frag.appendChild el
    inner.replaceChildren frag
    _prevPages = visiblePages.join ','

  _syncActive: (inner) ->
    for btn in inner.querySelectorAll('[data-page]')
      pg = parseInt btn.textContent
      if pg is @page
        btn.setAttribute 'aria-current', 'page'
        btn.setAttribute 'data-active', ''
      else
        btn.removeAttribute 'aria-current'
        btn.removeAttribute 'data-active'

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    inner = @_nav?.querySelector('[data-pages]')
    return unless inner

    key = visiblePages.join ','
    if key isnt _prevPages
      @_rebuild inner
    @_syncActive inner

  render
    nav ref: "_nav", aria-label: "Pagination", @keydown: @onKeydown
      button $prev: true, aria-label: "Previous page"
        disabled: @page <= 1
        $disabled: (@page <= 1)?!
        @click: (=> @goto(@page - 1))
      . $pages: true
      button $next: true, aria-label: "Next page"
        disabled: @page >= totalPages
        $disabled: (@page >= totalPages)?!
        @click: (=> @goto(@page + 1))
components.components/alert-dialog.rip:
# AlertDialog — accessible headless non-dismissable modal
#
# A Dialog variant that requires explicit user action to close.
# Cannot be dismissed by clicking outside or pressing Escape.
# Use for destructive confirmations, unsaved changes, etc.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   AlertDialog open <=> showConfirm
#     h2 "Delete account?"
#     p "This action cannot be undone."
#     button @click: (=> showConfirm = false), "Cancel"
#     button @click: handleDelete, "Delete"

export AlertDialog = component
  @open:: boolean := false
  @initialFocus:: any := null

  _prevFocus = null
  _id =! "adlg-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  ~>
    ARIA.bindDialog @open, (=> @_dialog), ((isOpen) =>
      if not isOpen and @open
        @open = false
        @emit 'close'
    ), false

  ~>
    if @open
      _prevFocus = document.activeElement
      ARIA.lockScroll(this)
      requestAnimationFrame =>
        panel = @_dialog
        if panel
          ARIA.wireAria panel, _id
          panel.setAttribute 'role', 'alertdialog'
          if @initialFocus
            target = if typeof @initialFocus is 'string' then panel.querySelector(@initialFocus) else @initialFocus
            target?.focus()
          else
            panel.querySelectorAll('a[href],button:not([disabled]),input:not([disabled]),select:not([disabled]),textarea:not([disabled]),[tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])')?[0]?.focus()
      return ->
        ARIA.unlockScroll(this)
        _prevFocus?.focus()

  close: ->
    @open = false
    @emit 'close'

  render
    dialog ref: "_dialog"
      hidden: not @open
      aria-hidden: (@open ? undefined : "true")
      $open: @open?!
      slot
components.components/editable-value.rip:
# EditableValue — accessible headless inline editable value
#
# Displays a value with an edit trigger. Clicking opens a popover form.
# Emits 'save' on submit. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   EditableValue @save: handleSave
#     span $display: true
#       "John Doe"
#     div $editor: true
#       input type: "text", value: name, @input: (e) => name = e.target.value

export EditableValue = component
  @disabled:: boolean := false

  editing := false
  saving := false
  _ready := false

  _onEdit: ->
    return if @disabled
    editing = true
    requestAnimationFrame => @_position()

  _onSave: ->
    return if saving
    saving = true
    @emit 'save'
    @close()

  _onCancel: ->
    editing = false
    saving = false

  close: ->
    editing = false
    saving = false

  setSaving: (val) -> saving = val

  _position: ->
    display = @_root?.querySelector('[data-display]')
    editor = @_root?.querySelector('[data-editor]')
    return unless display and editor
    @_root.style.position = 'relative'
    dr = display.getBoundingClientRect()
    cr = @_root.getBoundingClientRect()
    editor.style.position = 'absolute'
    editor.style.left = "0px"
    editor.style.top = "#{dr.bottom - cr.top + 4}px"
    editor.style.zIndex = '50'
    editor.querySelector('input, textarea, select')?.focus()

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true

  ~>
    _readyNow = _ready
    _editing = editing                                 # track before any early return
    return unless _readyNow
    display = @_root?.querySelector('[data-display]')
    editor = @_root?.querySelector('[data-editor]')
    return unless display and editor
    editor.hidden = not _editing
    if _editing
      editor.setAttribute 'data-open', ''
      onDown = (e) =>
        unless @_root?.contains(e.target)
          @_onCancel()
      document.addEventListener 'mousedown', onDown
      return -> document.removeEventListener 'mousedown', onDown
    else
      editor.removeAttribute 'data-open'

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    if e.key is 'Escape' and editing
      e.preventDefault()
      @_onCancel()
    if e.key is 'Enter' and editing
      e.preventDefault()
      @_onSave()

  render
    div ref: "_root", $editing: editing?!, $disabled: @disabled?!, $saving: saving?!
      slot
      unless editing
        button $edit-trigger: true, aria-label: "Edit", @click: @_onEdit
          "✎"
components.components/date-picker.rip:
# DatePicker — accessible headless date picker with calendar
#
# A popover calendar for selecting a single date or a date range.
# Set @range to true for range selection (value becomes [from, to]).
# Keyboard: Arrow keys navigate days, Enter selects, Escape closes.
# Ships zero CSS — style entirely via attribute selectors in your stylesheet.
#
# Usage:
#   DatePicker value <=> selectedDate, placeholder: "Pick a date"
#   DatePicker value <=> dateRange, range: true

dpFmt = (d) ->
  return '' unless d
  m = String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
  day = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')
  "#{m}/#{day}/#{d.getFullYear()}"

dpParse = (str) ->
  return null unless str?.length is 10
  parts = str.split('/')
  return null unless parts.length is 3
  [m, d, y] = parts.map Number
  return null if isNaN(m) or isNaN(d) or isNaN(y)
  dt = new Date(y, m - 1, d)
  return null if dt.getMonth() isnt m - 1
  dt

dpSameDay = (a, b) ->
  return false unless a and b
  a.getFullYear() is b.getFullYear() and a.getMonth() is b.getMonth() and a.getDate() is b.getDate()

dpInRange = (day, from, to) ->
  return false unless day and from and to
  t = day.getTime()
  lo = Math.min(from.getTime(), to.getTime())
  hi = Math.max(from.getTime(), to.getTime())
  t >= lo and t <= hi

export DatePicker = component
  @value:: any := null
  @placeholder:: string := "mm/dd/yyyy"
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @range:: boolean := false
  @firstDayOfWeek:: number := 0

  open := false
  viewMonth := new Date()
  _rangeStart := null
  _hoveredDay := null
  _inputText := ''
  _id =! "dp-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  _dayNames =! ['Su', 'Mo', 'Tu', 'We', 'Th', 'Fr', 'Sa']

  _daysInView ~=
    yr = viewMonth.getFullYear()
    mo = viewMonth.getMonth()
    firstOfMonth = new Date(yr, mo, 1)
    startDay = firstOfMonth.getDay()
    offset = (startDay - @firstDayOfWeek + 7) %% 7
    daysInMonth = new Date(yr, mo + 1, 0).getDate()
    prevMonthDays = new Date(yr, mo, 0).getDate()
    dayList = []
    for n in [0...offset]
      dayList.push { date: new Date(yr, mo - 1, prevMonthDays - offset + n + 1), outside: true }
    for n in [1..daysInMonth]
      dayList.push { date: new Date(yr, mo, n), outside: false }
    trailing = (7 - dayList.length %% 7) %% 7
    for n in [1..trailing]
      dayList.push { date: new Date(yr, mo + 1, n), outside: true }
    dayList

  _displayText ~=
    if @range
      if Array.isArray(@value) and @value[0]
        from = dpFmt(@value[0])
        to = if @value[1] then dpFmt(@value[1]) else '...'
        "#{from} – #{to}"
      else
        @placeholder
    else
      if @value then dpFmt(@value) else @placeholder

  _monthLabel ~=
    viewMonth.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })

  _today =! new Date()

  _prevMonth: ->
    viewMonth = new Date(viewMonth.getFullYear(), viewMonth.getMonth() - 1, 1)

  _nextMonth: ->
    viewMonth = new Date(viewMonth.getFullYear(), viewMonth.getMonth() + 1, 1)

  _selectDay: (day) ->
    return if @disabled
    if @range
      if _rangeStart and not dpSameDay(_rangeStart, day)
        from = if _rangeStart < day then _rangeStart else day
        to = if _rangeStart < day then day else _rangeStart
        @value = [from, to]
        _rangeStart = null
        @emit 'change', @value
        open = false
      else
        _rangeStart = day
        @value = [day, null]
    else
      @value = day
      @emit 'change', @value
      open = false
    _inputText = _displayText

  _onInputChange: (e) ->
    raw = e.target.value.replace(/[^\d\/]/g, '')
    if raw.length <= 10
      _inputText = raw
    if raw.length is 10
      dt = dpParse(raw)
      if dt
        @value = dt
        viewMonth = new Date(dt.getFullYear(), dt.getMonth(), 1)
        @emit 'change', @value

  toggle: ->
    return if @disabled
    if open then @close() else @openPicker()

  openPicker: ->
    open = true
    if @value and not @range
      viewMonth = new Date(@value.getFullYear(), @value.getMonth(), 1)
    else if @range and Array.isArray(@value) and @value[0]
      viewMonth = new Date(@value[0].getFullYear(), @value[0].getMonth(), 1)
    _inputText = _displayText
    requestAnimationFrame => @_position()

  close: ->
    open = false
    _rangeStart = null
    _hoveredDay = null

  _position: -> ARIA.positionBelow @_trigger, @_cal, 4, false

  _onKeydown: (e) ->
    switch e.key
      when 'Escape'
        e.preventDefault()
        @close()
        @_trigger?.focus()
      when 'Enter', ' '
        e.preventDefault()
        @toggle() unless open

  ~>
    if open
      onDown = (e) =>
        unless @_trigger?.contains(e.target) or @_cal?.contains(e.target)
          @close()
      document.addEventListener 'mousedown', onDown
      return -> document.removeEventListener 'mousedown', onDown

  render
    . $open: open?!, $disabled: @disabled?!, $range: @range?!

      # Trigger
      button ref: "_trigger", $trigger: true
        aria-haspopup: "dialog"
        aria-expanded: !!open
        disabled: @disabled
        @click: @toggle
        @keydown: @_onKeydown
        _displayText

      # Calendar dropdown
      if open
        div ref: "_cal", role: "dialog", aria-label: "Date picker", $calendar: true
          style: "position:fixed;z-index:50"

          # Month navigation
          . $header: true
            button $prev: true, aria-label: "Previous month", @click: @_prevMonth
              "‹"
            span $month-label: true
              _monthLabel
            button $next: true, aria-label: "Next month", @click: @_nextMonth
              "›"

          # Day-of-week headers
          . $weekdays: true
            for dayName in _dayNames
              span $weekday: true
                dayName

          # Day grid
          . $days: true, role: "grid"
            for entry, dIdx in _daysInView
              button role: "gridcell", tabIndex: -1
                $outside: entry.outside?!
                $today: dpSameDay(entry.date, _today)?!
                $selected: (if @range then (Array.isArray(@value) and (dpSameDay(entry.date, @value[0]) or dpSameDay(entry.date, @value[1]))) else dpSameDay(entry.date, @value))?!
                $in-range: (if @range then (if _rangeStart then dpInRange(entry.date, _rangeStart, _hoveredDay or _rangeStart) else if Array.isArray(@value) and @value[0] and @value[1] then dpInRange(entry.date, @value[0], @value[1]) else false) else false)?!
                $range-start: (if @range and _rangeStart then dpSameDay(entry.date, _rangeStart) else false)?!
                @click: (=> @_selectDay(entry.date))
                @mouseenter: (=> _hoveredDay = entry.date)
                entry.date.getDate()
components.components/progress.rip:
# Progress — accessible headless progress bar
#
# Exposes progress value as CSS custom property for styling.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Progress value: 0.65
#   Progress value: 42, max: 100

export Progress = component
  @value:: number := 0
  @max:: number := 1
  @label:: any := null

  percent ~= Math.min(100, Math.max(0, (@value / @max) * 100))

  render
    div role: "progressbar"
      aria-valuenow: @value
      aria-valuemin: 0
      aria-valuemax: @max
      aria-label: @label?!
      style: "--progress-value: #{@value}; --progress-percent: #{percent}%"
      $complete: (percent >= 100)?!
      slot
components.components/button-group.rip:
# ButtonGroup — accessible headless button group
#
# Groups related buttons with proper ARIA semantics.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   ButtonGroup
#     Button "Cut"
#     Button "Copy"
#     Button "Paste"
#   ButtonGroup orientation: "vertical", label: "Text formatting"
#     Toggle pressed <=> isBold, "Bold"
#     Toggle pressed <=> isItalic, "Italic"

export ButtonGroup = component
  @orientation:: "horizontal" | "vertical" := "horizontal"
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @label:: string := ""

  render
    div role: "group"
      aria-label: @label?!
      aria-orientation: @orientation
      $orientation: @orientation
      $disabled: @disabled?!
      slot
components.components/tabs.rip:
# Tabs — accessible headless tab widget
#
# Keyboard: ArrowLeft/Right (horizontal) or ArrowUp/Down (vertical) to navigate,
# Home/End for first/last. Manages focus via roving tabindex.
# Exposes $active on tabs and panels. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Props:
#   active       — currently active tab id (two-way bindable)
#   orientation  — 'horizontal' (default) or 'vertical'
#   activation   — 'automatic' (default, selects on focus) or 'manual' (Enter/Space to select)
#
# Usage:
#   Tabs active <=> currentTab
#     div $tab: "one", "Tab One"
#     div $tab: "two", "Tab Two"
#     div $panel: "one"
#       p "Content for tab one"
#     div $panel: "two"
#       p "Content for tab two"

export Tabs = component
  @active:: any := null
  @orientation:: "horizontal" | "vertical" := "horizontal"
  @activation:: "automatic" | "manual" := "automatic"
  _ready       := false
  _id =! "tabs-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"
  activationDirection := 'none'

  tabs ~=
    return [] unless _ready
    Array.from(@_content?.querySelectorAll('[data-tab]') or [])

  panels ~=
    return [] unless _ready
    Array.from(@_content?.querySelectorAll('[data-panel]') or [])

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true
    unless @active
      @active = tabs[0]?.dataset.tab

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    tabs.forEach (el) -> el.hidden = true
    panels.forEach (el) =>
      id = el.dataset.panel
      isActive = id is @active
      el.id = "#{_id}-panel-#{id}"
      el.setAttribute 'role', 'tabpanel'
      el.setAttribute 'aria-labelledby', "#{_id}-tab-#{id}"
      el.toggleAttribute 'hidden', not isActive
      el.toggleAttribute 'data-active', isActive

  _isDisabled: (el) -> el?.hasAttribute('data-disabled')

  _tabButtons: ->
    Array.from(@_tablist?.querySelectorAll('[role="tab"]') or [])

  select: (id) ->
    prev = @active
    horiz = @orientation is 'horizontal'
    if prev and id isnt prev
      oldTab = tabs.find (t) -> t.dataset.tab is prev
      newTab = tabs.find (t) -> t.dataset.tab is id
      if oldTab and newTab
        oldRect = oldTab.getBoundingClientRect()
        newRect = newTab.getBoundingClientRect()
        activationDirection = if horiz
          if newRect.left > oldRect.left then 'right' else 'left'
        else
          if newRect.top > oldRect.top then 'down' else 'up'
    @active = id
    @emit 'change', id

  _nextEnabled: (ids, from, dir) ->
    len = ids.length
    i = from
    loop len
      i = (i + dir) %% len
      tab = @_tabButtons().find (t) -> t.dataset.tab is ids[i]
      return ids[i] unless @_isDisabled(tab)
    ids[from]

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    buttons = @_tabButtons()
    ids = buttons.map (t) -> t.dataset.tab
    idx = ids.indexOf @active
    return if idx is -1
    move = (nextId) =>
      return unless nextId
      buttons.find((t) -> t.dataset.tab is nextId)?.focus()
      @select(nextId) if @activation is 'automatic'
    ARIA.rovingNav e, {
      next:   => move(@_nextEnabled(ids, idx,              1))
      prev:   => move(@_nextEnabled(ids, idx,             -1))
      first:  => move(@_nextEnabled(ids, ids.length - 1,   1))
      last:   => move(@_nextEnabled(ids, 0,               -1))
      select: => @select(ids[idx]) if @activation is 'manual'
    }, @orientation

  render
    .
      div ref: "_tablist", role: "tablist", aria-orientation: @orientation, data-activation-direction: activationDirection, @keydown: @onKeydown
        for tab in tabs
          button role: "tab"
            data-tab: tab.dataset.tab
            id: "#{_id}-tab-#{tab.dataset.tab}"
            aria-selected: tab.dataset.tab is @active
            aria-controls: "#{_id}-panel-#{tab.dataset.tab}"
            aria-disabled: @_isDisabled(tab)?!
            tabindex: if @_isDisabled(tab) then '-1' else (tab.dataset.tab is @active ? '0' : '-1')
            $active: (tab.dataset.tab is @active)?!
            $disabled: @_isDisabled(tab)?!
            @click: (=> @select(tab.dataset.tab) unless @_isDisabled(tab))
            = tab.textContent

      . ref: "_content"
        slot
