# InputGroup — accessible headless input with prefix/suffix
#
# Wraps a form control with optional prefix and suffix elements.
# Use $prefix and $suffix on children to mark addon positions.
# Tracks child input focus for styling. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   InputGroup
#     span $prefix: true, "$"
#     Input value <=> amount, type: "number"
#   InputGroup
#     Input value <=> search, placeholder: "Search..."
#     button $suffix: true, @click: doSearch, "Go"

export InputGroup = component
  @disabled:: boolean := false

  focused := false

  mounted: ->
    ctrl = @_root?.querySelector('input, select, textarea')
    return unless ctrl
    ctrl.addEventListener 'focusin', => focused = true
    ctrl.addEventListener 'focusout', => focused = false

  render
    div ref: "_root", $disabled: @disabled?!, $focused: focused?!
      slot
components.components/slider.rip:
# Slider — accessible headless range slider
#
# Supports single and range (multi-thumb) modes, pointer drag with capture,
# keyboard stepping, and CSS custom properties for thumb/indicator positioning.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Slider value <=> volume
#   Slider value <=> volume, min: 0, max: 100, step: 5
#   Slider value <=> range, min: 0, max: 100   (pass array for range mode)

export Slider = component
  @value:: number := 0
  @min:: number := 0
  @max:: number := 100
  @step:: number := 1
  @largeStep:: number := 10
  @orientation:: "horizontal" | "vertical" := "horizontal"
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @name:: any := null
  @valueText:: any := null

  dragging := false
  activeThumb := -1
  _thumbOffset = 0
  _id =! "sld-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  isRange ~= Array.isArray(@value)
  values  ~= if isRange then @value else [@value]
  horiz   ~= @orientation is 'horizontal'

  _clamp: (v) -> Math.min(@max, Math.max(@min, v))

  _roundToStep: (v) ->
    rounded = Math.round((v - @min) / @step) * @step + @min
    precision = String(@step).split('.')[1]?.length or 0
    parseFloat rounded.toFixed(precision)

  _percentOf: (v) -> ((@_clamp(v) - @min) / (@max - @min)) * 100

  _valueFromPointer: (e) ->
    rect = @_track.getBoundingClientRect()
    if horiz
      ratio = (e.clientX - _thumbOffset - rect.left) / rect.width
    else
      ratio = 1 - (e.clientY - _thumbOffset - rect.top) / rect.height
    ratio = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, ratio))
    @_roundToStep(@min + ratio * (@max - @min))

  _closestThumb: (e) ->
    return 0 unless isRange
    rect = @_track.getBoundingClientRect()
    pos = if horiz then (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width else 1 - (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height
    best = 0
    bestDist = Infinity
    for v, i in values
      pct = @_percentOf(v) / 100
      dist = Math.abs(pos - pct)
      if dist < bestDist
        bestDist = dist
        best = i
    best

  _setValue: (idx, val) ->
    val = @_clamp(@_roundToStep(val))
    if isRange
      arr = [...values]
      arr[idx] = val
      arr.sort (a, b) -> a - b
      @value = arr
    else
      @value = val
    @emit 'input', @value

  _commitValue: ->
    @emit 'change', @value

  _focusThumb: (idx) ->
    requestAnimationFrame =>
      @_track?.querySelector("#" + "#{_id}-thumb-#{idx}")?.focus()

  _onPointerDown: (e) ->
    return if @disabled or e.button isnt 0
    e.preventDefault()
    idx = @_closestThumb(e)
    activeThumb = idx
    dragging = true

    thumb = @_track.querySelectorAll('[data-thumb]')[idx]
    if thumb
      tr = thumb.getBoundingClientRect()
      if horiz
        _thumbOffset = e.clientX - (tr.left + tr.width / 2)
      else
        _thumbOffset = e.clientY - (tr.top + tr.height / 2)
    else
      _thumbOffset = 0

    newVal = @_valueFromPointer(e)
    @_setValue idx, newVal

    @_track.setPointerCapture e.pointerId

  _onPointerMove: (e) ->
    return unless dragging
    newVal = @_valueFromPointer(e)
    @_setValue activeThumb, newVal

  _onPointerUp: (e) ->
    return unless dragging
    dragging = false
    activeThumb = -1
    _thumbOffset = 0
    @_track.releasePointerCapture e.pointerId
    @_commitValue()

  _onKeydown: (e, idx) ->
    s = if e.shiftKey then @largeStep else @step
    v = values[idx]
    newVal = switch e.key
      when 'ArrowRight', 'ArrowUp' then v + s
      when 'ArrowLeft', 'ArrowDown' then v - s
      when 'PageUp' then v + @largeStep
      when 'PageDown' then v - @largeStep
      when 'Home' then @min
      when 'End' then @max
      else null
    if newVal?
      e.preventDefault()
      @_setValue idx, newVal
      @_commitValue()
      @_focusThumb idx

  render
    div role: "group", $orientation: @orientation, $disabled: @disabled?!, $dragging: dragging?!
      style: "--slider-min: #{@min}; --slider-max: #{@max}"

      # Track
      div ref: "_track", $track: true
        style: "position:relative"
        @pointerdown: @_onPointerDown
        @pointermove: @_onPointerMove
        @pointerup: @_onPointerUp

        # Indicator (filled portion)
        if isRange
          div $indicator: true
            style: "position:absolute; #{if horiz then 'left' else 'bottom'}: #{@_percentOf(values[0])}%; #{if horiz then 'width' else 'height'}: #{@_percentOf(values[1]) - @_percentOf(values[0])}%"
        else
          div $indicator: true
            style: "position:absolute; #{if horiz then 'left: 0; width' else 'bottom: 0; height'}: #{@_percentOf(values[0])}%"

        # Thumbs
        for val, idx in values
          div $thumb: true, $active: (idx is activeThumb)?!
            style: "position:absolute; #{if horiz then 'left' else 'bottom'}: #{@_percentOf(val)}%; z-index: #{if idx is activeThumb then 2 else 1}"
            input type: "range", style: "position:absolute;opacity:0;width:0;height:0;pointer-events:none"
              id: "#{_id}-thumb-#{idx}"
              name: @name?!
              min: @min, max: @max, step: @step
              value: val
              aria-valuenow: val
              aria-valuemin: @min
              aria-valuemax: @max
              aria-valuetext: if @valueText then @valueText(val, idx) else undefined
              aria-orientation: @orientation
              aria-disabled: @disabled?!
              @keydown: (e) => @_onKeydown(e, idx)

      slot

# Card — accessible headless content container
#
# Structured container with optional header, content, and footer sections.

# Usage:
#   Card
#     div $header: true
#       h3 "Title"
#     div $content: true
#       p "Body text"
#     div $footer: true
#       Button "Action"
#
#   Card interactive: true, @click: handleClick

components.components/popover.rip:
# Popover — accessible headless popover with anchor positioning
#
# Uses the native Popover API (top-layer + light-dismiss) and CSS anchor
# positioning. Exposes $open, $placement on content. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Popover placement: "bottom-start"
#     button $trigger: true, "Click me"
#     div $content: true
#       p "Popover content"

export Popover = component
  @placement:: "top" | "top-start" | "top-end" | "bottom" | "bottom-start" | "bottom-end" | "left" | "right" := "bottom-start"
  @offset:: number := 4
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @openOnHover:: boolean := false
  @hoverDelay:: number := 300
  @hoverCloseDelay:: number := 200

  open := false
  _ready := false
  _hoverTimer := null
  _hoverCloseTimer := null
  _id =! "pop-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  _applyPlacement: ->
    trigger = @_content?.querySelector('[data-trigger]')
    floating = @_content?.querySelector('[data-content]')
    [side, align] = @placement.split('-')
    align ??= 'center'
    ARIA.position trigger, floating, placement: "#{side} #{align}", offset: @offset

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true
    trigger = @_content?.querySelector('[data-trigger]')
    floating = @_content?.querySelector('[data-content]')
    if trigger and floating
      floating.id = _id
      floating.setAttribute 'popover', 'auto'
      trigger.setAttribute 'aria-expanded', false
      trigger.setAttribute 'aria-haspopup', 'dialog'
      trigger.setAttribute 'aria-controls', _id
      trigger.addEventListener 'click', =>
        return if @disabled
        open = not open
      trigger.addEventListener 'keydown', (e) =>
        if e.key in ['Enter', ' ', 'ArrowDown']
          e.preventDefault()
          return if @disabled
          open = not open
      if @openOnHover
        trigger.addEventListener 'mouseenter', =>
          clearTimeout _hoverCloseTimer if _hoverCloseTimer
          _hoverTimer = setTimeout (=> open = true), @hoverDelay
        trigger.addEventListener 'mouseleave', =>
          clearTimeout _hoverTimer if _hoverTimer
          _hoverCloseTimer = setTimeout (=> open = false), @hoverCloseDelay
      @_applyPlacement()

  toggle: ->
    return if @disabled
    open = not open

  openPopover: ->
    open = true

  close: ->
    open = false

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    trigger = @_content?.querySelector('[data-trigger]')
    floating = @_content?.querySelector('[data-content]')
    if trigger
      trigger.setAttribute 'aria-expanded', !!open
    if floating
      floating.hidden = not open
      if open then floating.removeAttribute 'aria-hidden' else floating.setAttribute 'aria-hidden', 'true'
      floating.setAttribute 'data-placement', @placement
      if open then floating.setAttribute 'data-open', '' else floating.removeAttribute 'data-open'
      ARIA.wireAria floating, _id
      @_applyPlacement()

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    ARIA.bindPopover open, (=> @_content?.querySelector('[data-content]')), ((isOpen) => open = isOpen), (=> @_content?.querySelector('[data-trigger]'))

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    if e.key is 'Escape' and open
      e.preventDefault()
      @close()

  render
    div ref: "_content"
      slot

export Toggle = component

#   Button disabled: true
#     "Unavailable"

export Button = component extends button

components.components/toast.rip:
# Toast — accessible headless toast notification system
#
# Managed toast system with stacking, timer pause on hover, and promise support.
# Uses ARIA live region for screen reader announcements. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   toasts := []
#
#   # Add a toast — reactive assignment is the API
#   toasts = [...toasts, { message: "Saved!", type: "success" }]
#
#   # Dismiss — filter it out
#   toasts = toasts.filter (t) -> t isnt target
#
#   # Clear all
#   toasts = []
#
#   # In render block
#   ToastViewport toasts <=> toasts

export ToastViewport = component
  @toasts:: any[] := []
  @placement:: "top-left" | "top-right" | "bottom-left" | "bottom-right" := "bottom-right"

  _onDismiss: (toast) ->
    @toasts = @toasts.filter (t) -> t isnt toast

  render
    div role: "region", aria-label: "Notifications", $placement: @placement
      for toast in @toasts
        Toast toast: toast, @dismiss: (e) => @_onDismiss(e.detail)

export Toast = component
  @toast:: Record<string, any> := {}

  leaving := false
  _timer := null
  _remaining = 0
  _started = 0

  _startTimer: ->
    dur = @toast.duration ?? 4000
    return unless dur > 0
    _remaining = dur
    _started = Date.now()
    _timer = setTimeout => @dismiss(), dur

  _pauseTimer: ->
    return unless _timer
    clearTimeout _timer
    _remaining -= Date.now() - _started
    _timer = null

  _resumeTimer: ->
    return if _timer or _remaining <= 0
    _started = Date.now()
    _timer = setTimeout => @dismiss(), _remaining

  mounted: -> @_startTimer()

  beforeUnmount: ->
    clearTimeout _timer if _timer

  dismiss: ->
    leaving = true
    setTimeout =>
      @emit 'dismiss', @toast
    , 200

  render
    div role: (if @toast.type is 'error' then 'alert' else 'status'),
      aria-live: (if @toast.type is 'error' then 'assertive' else 'polite'),
      $type: @toast.type ?? 'info',
      $leaving: leaving?!,
      @mouseenter: @_pauseTimer,
      @mouseleave: @_resumeTimer,
      @focusin: @_pauseTimer,
      @focusout: @_resumeTimer
      .
        if @toast.title
          strong @toast.title
        span @toast.message
        if @toast.action
          button @click: @toast.action.onClick
            @toast.action.label or 'Action'
        button aria-label: "Dismiss", @click: @dismiss
          "✕"
components.components/number-field.rip:
# NumberField — accessible headless number input with stepper buttons
#
# Increment/decrement with click, hold-to-repeat, and keyboard.
# Supports min/max/step clamping and Shift/Alt step modifiers.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   NumberField value <=> quantity
#   NumberField value <=> price, min: 0, max: 1000, step: 0.01

START_DELAY = 400
TICK_DELAY  = 60

export NumberField = component
  @value:: number := 0
  @min:: any := null
  @max:: any := null
  @step:: number := 1
  @smallStep:: number := 0.1
  @largeStep:: number := 10
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @readOnly:: boolean := false
  @name:: any := null

  _timer = null
  _interval = null
  _id =! "nf-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  _clamp: (v) ->
    v = Math.max(@min, v) if @min?
    v = Math.min(@max, v) if @max?
    v

  _roundToStep: (v) ->
    base = @min ?? 0
    rounded = Math.round((v - base) / @step) * @step + base
    precision = String(@step).split('.')[1]?.length or 0
    parseFloat rounded.toFixed(precision)

  _stepAmount: (e) ->
    if e?.altKey then @smallStep
    else if e?.shiftKey then @largeStep
    else @step

  increment: (amount) ->
    return if @disabled or @readOnly
    @value = @_clamp(@_roundToStep(+@value + amount))
    @emit 'input', @value

  decrement: (amount) ->
    return if @disabled or @readOnly
    @value = @_clamp(@_roundToStep(+@value - amount))
    @emit 'input', @value

  _startRepeat: (dir, e) ->
    amount = @_stepAmount(e)
    tick = => if dir > 0 then @increment(amount) else @decrement(amount)
    tick()
    _timer = setTimeout =>
      _interval = setInterval tick, TICK_DELAY
    , START_DELAY

  _stopRepeat: ->
    clearTimeout _timer if _timer
    clearInterval _interval if _interval
    _timer = null
    _interval = null
    @emit 'change', @value

  _onIncDown: (e) ->
    return if @disabled or @readOnly or e.button isnt 0
    e.preventDefault()
    @_input?.focus()
    @_startRepeat 1, e
    onUp = =>
      @_stopRepeat()
      document.removeEventListener 'pointerup', onUp
    document.addEventListener 'pointerup', onUp

  _onDecDown: (e) ->
    return if @disabled or @readOnly or e.button isnt 0
    e.preventDefault()
    @_input?.focus()
    @_startRepeat -1, e
    onUp = =>
      @_stopRepeat()
      document.removeEventListener 'pointerup', onUp
    document.addEventListener 'pointerup', onUp

  _onKeydown: (e) ->
    return if @disabled or @readOnly
    amount = @_stepAmount(e)
    switch e.key
      when 'ArrowUp'
        e.preventDefault()
        @increment(amount)
        @emit 'change', @value
      when 'ArrowDown'
        e.preventDefault()
        @decrement(amount)
        @emit 'change', @value
      when 'PageUp'
        e.preventDefault()
        @increment(@largeStep)
        @emit 'change', @value
      when 'PageDown'
        e.preventDefault()
        @decrement(@largeStep)
        @emit 'change', @value
      when 'Home'
        if @min?
          e.preventDefault()
          @value = @min
          @emit 'change', @value
      when 'End'
        if @max?
          e.preventDefault()
          @value = @max
          @emit 'change', @value

  _onBlur: ->
    val = parseFloat @_input?.value
    unless isNaN(val)
      @value = @_clamp(@_roundToStep(val))
    @emit 'change', @value

  _ready := false

  mounted: -> _ready = true

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    @_input?.value = String(@value)

  beforeUnmount: -> @_stopRepeat()

  render
    div role: "group", $disabled: @disabled?!, $readonly: @readOnly?!
      button aria-label: "Decrease", tabIndex: -1
        $decrement: true
        aria-controls: _id
        disabled: @disabled or (@min? and @value <= @min)
        @pointerdown: @_onDecDown

      input ref: "_input", id: _id, type: "text", inputmode: "numeric"
        name: @name?!
        aria-roledescription: "Number field"
        aria-valuenow: @value
        aria-valuemin: @min?!
        aria-valuemax: @max?!
        aria-disabled: @disabled?!
        aria-readonly: @readOnly?!
        disabled: @disabled
        readonly: @readOnly
        @keydown: @_onKeydown
        @blur: @_onBlur

      button aria-label: "Increase", tabIndex: -1
        $increment: true
        aria-controls: _id
        disabled: @disabled or (@max? and @value >= @max)
        @pointerdown: @_onIncDown
components.components/otp-field.rip:
# OTPField — accessible headless one-time password input
#
# Multi-digit code input with auto-advance, backspace navigation, and
# paste support. Each digit gets its own input box. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   OTPField length: 6, value <=> code, @complete: handleVerify

export OTPField = component
  @length:: number := 6
  @value:: string := ""
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @mask:: boolean := false

  _id =! "otp-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  _getInputs: ->
    return [] unless @_root
    Array.from(@_root.querySelectorAll('input'))

  _focusAt: (idx) ->
    inputs = @_getInputs()
    inputs[idx]?.focus()
    inputs[idx]?.select()

  _updateValue: ->
    inputs = @_getInputs()
    digits = inputs.map (el) -> el.value
    @value = digits.join('')
    @emit 'input', @value
    if @value.length is @length and digits.every (d) -> d.length is 1
      @emit 'complete', @value

  _onInput: (e, idx) ->
    ch = e.target.value.slice(-1)
    e.target.value = ch
    @_updateValue()
    @_focusAt(idx + 1) if ch and idx < @length - 1

  _onKeydown: (e, idx) ->
    switch e.key
      when 'Backspace'
        if not e.target.value and idx > 0
          @_focusAt(idx - 1)
          inputs = @_getInputs()
          inputs[idx - 1]?.value = ''
          @_updateValue()
      when 'ArrowLeft'
        e.preventDefault()
        @_focusAt(idx - 1) if idx > 0
      when 'ArrowRight'
        e.preventDefault()
        @_focusAt(idx + 1) if idx < @length - 1
      when 'Home'
        e.preventDefault()
        @_focusAt(0)
      when 'End'
        e.preventDefault()
        @_focusAt(@length - 1)

  _onPaste: (e) ->
    e.preventDefault()
    text = (e.clipboardData?.getData('text') or '').replace(/\D/g, '').slice(0, @length)
    return unless text
    inputs = @_getInputs()
    for ch, idx in text.split('')
      inputs[idx]?.value = ch
    @_updateValue()
    @_focusAt(Math.min(text.length, @length - 1))

  _onFocus: (e) -> e.target.select()

  render
    div ref: "_root", role: "group", aria-label: "One-time password"
      $disabled: @disabled?!
      $complete: (@value.length is @length)?!
      for idx in [0...@length]
        input id: "#{_id}-#{idx}"
          type: if @mask then "password" else "text"
          inputmode: "numeric"
          autocomplete: "one-time-code"
          maxlength: "1"
          aria-label: "Digit #{idx + 1} of #{@length}"
          disabled: @disabled
          $filled: (@value[idx])?!
          @input: (e) => @_onInput(e, idx)
          @keydown: (e) => @_onKeydown(e, idx)
          @paste: @_onPaste
          @focus: @_onFocus

components.components/autocomplete.rip:
# Autocomplete — accessible headless suggestion input
#
# Like Combobox but the input value IS the value (no selection from a list).
# Suggestions are shown as the user types; selecting a suggestion fills the input.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Autocomplete value <=> city, items: cities, @filter: filterCities

acCollator = new Intl.Collator(undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' })

export Autocomplete = component
  @value:: string := ""
  @items:: any[] := []
  @placeholder:: string := "Type to search..."
  @disabled:: boolean := false

  open := false
  _ready := false
  _popupGuard =! ARIA.popupGuard()

  filteredItems ~=
    q = @value.trim()
    return @items unless q
    @items.filter (item) ->
      label = if typeof item is 'string' then item else (item.label or item.name or String(item))
      acCollator.compare(label.slice(0, q.length), q) is 0

  _listId =! "ac-list-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  _getItems: ->
    return [] unless @_list
    Array.from(@_list.querySelectorAll('[role="option"]'))

  _updateHighlight: ->
    idx = @_hlIdx
    opts = @_getItems()
    opts.forEach (el, ndx) ->
      el.id = "#{@_listId}-opt-#{ndx}" unless el.id
      el.toggleAttribute 'data-highlighted', ndx is idx
    activeId = if idx >= 0 and opts[idx] then opts[idx].id else undefined
    if @_input
      if activeId then @_input.setAttribute 'aria-activedescendant', activeId
      else @_input.removeAttribute 'aria-activedescendant'
    opts[idx]?.scrollIntoView({ block: 'nearest' })

  openMenu: ->
    return unless _popupGuard.canOpen()
    open = true
    @_hlIdx = -1
    @_input?.focus()

  close: (restoreFocus = true, blockOpen = false) ->
    open = false
    @_hlIdx = -1
    @_input?.removeAttribute 'aria-activedescendant'
    _popupGuard.block() if blockOpen
    @_input?.focus() if restoreFocus

  _applyPlacement: ->
    ARIA.position @_input, @_list, placement: 'bottom start', offset: 2, matchWidth: true

  selectIndex: (idx) ->
    item = filteredItems[idx]
    return unless item
    label = if typeof item is 'string' then item else (item.label or item.name or String(item))
    @value = label
    @_input?.value = label
    @emit 'select', item
    @close(true, true)

  onInput: (e) ->
    newVal = e.target.value
    return if newVal is @value
    @value = newVal
    open = true
    @_hlIdx = if filteredItems.length > 0 then 0 else -1
    setTimeout (=> @_updateHighlight()), 0

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    len = filteredItems.length
    ARIA.listNav e,
      next:    => @openMenu() unless open; if len then @_hlIdx = (@_hlIdx + 1) %% len;                         @_updateHighlight()
      prev:    => @openMenu() unless open; if len then @_hlIdx = if @_hlIdx <= 0 then len - 1 else @_hlIdx - 1; @_updateHighlight()
      first:   => if len then @_hlIdx = 0;       @_updateHighlight()
      last:    => if len then @_hlIdx = len - 1; @_updateHighlight()
      select:  => @selectIndex(@_hlIdx) if @_hlIdx >= 0
      dismiss: => @close()
      tab:     => @close(false, true)

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    if @_list
      @_applyPlacement()
    ARIA.bindPopover open, (=> @_list), ((isOpen) => open = isOpen), (=> @_input)
    ARIA.popupDismiss open, (=> @_list), (=> @close(false, true)), [=> @_input]

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true
    @_hlIdx = -1
    @_input.value = @value if @_input and @value

  render
    . $open: open?!

      input ref: "_input", role: "combobox", type: "text"
        autocomplete: "off"
        aria-expanded: !!open
        aria-haspopup: "listbox"
        aria-autocomplete: "list"
        aria-controls: open ? _listId : undefined
        $disabled: @disabled?!
        disabled: @disabled
        placeholder: @placeholder
        @input: @onInput
        @keydown: @onKeydown

      div ref: "_list"
        id: _listId
        role: "listbox"
        popover: "auto"
        hidden: not open
        aria-hidden: (open ? undefined : "true")
        $open: open?!
        style: "position:fixed;margin:0;inset:auto"
        for item, idx in filteredItems
          div role: "option", tabIndex: -1
            @click: (=> @selectIndex(idx))
            @mouseenter: (=> @_hlIdx = idx; @_updateHighlight())
            "#{if typeof item is 'string' then item else (item.label or item.name or String(item))}"
components.components/context-menu.rip:
# ContextMenu — accessible headless right-click menu
#
# Opens on contextmenu event (right-click) over the trigger area.
# Keyboard navigation matches Menu. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   ContextMenu @select: handleAction
#     div $trigger: true
#       p "Right-click this area"
#     div $item: "cut", "Cut"
#     div $item: "copy", "Copy"
#     div $item: "paste", "Paste"

export ContextMenu = component
  @disabled:: boolean := false

  open := false
  highlightedIndex := -1
  posX := 0
  posY := 0

  _menuItems ~=
    return [] unless @_slot
    Array.from(@_slot.querySelectorAll('[data-item]') or [])

  _triggerEl ~=
    return null unless @_slot
    @_slot.querySelector('[data-trigger]')

  _onContextMenu: (e) ->
    return if @disabled
    e.preventDefault()
    posX = e.clientX
    posY = e.clientY
    open = true
    highlightedIndex = 0
    requestAnimationFrame =>
      @_list?.querySelectorAll('[role="menuitem"]')[0]?.focus()

  close: ->
    open = false
    highlightedIndex = -1

  selectIndex: (idx) ->
    item = _menuItems[idx]
    return unless item
    return if item.dataset.disabled?
    @emit 'select', item.dataset.item
    @close()

  _focusItem: (idx) ->
    highlightedIndex = idx
    @_list?.querySelectorAll('[role="menuitem"]')[idx]?.focus()

  _onKeydown: (e) ->
    return unless _menuItems.length
    len = _menuItems.length
    ARIA.listNav e,
      next:    => @_focusItem((highlightedIndex + 1) %% len)
      prev:    => @_focusItem((highlightedIndex - 1) %% len)
      first:   => @_focusItem(0)
      last:    => @_focusItem(len - 1)
      select:  => @selectIndex(highlightedIndex)
      dismiss: => @close()
      tab:     => @close()

  ~> ARIA.popupDismiss open, (=> @_list), (=> @close())

  render
    . @contextmenu: @_onContextMenu

      . ref: "_slot", style: "display:none"
        slot

      if _triggerEl
        . innerHTML: _triggerEl.innerHTML

      if open
        div ref: "_list", role: "menu", $open: true, @keydown: @_onKeydown
          style: "position:fixed;left:#{posX}px;top:#{posY}px;z-index:50"
          for item, idx in _menuItems
            div role: "menuitem", tabIndex: -1
              $highlighted: (idx is highlightedIndex)?!
              $disabled: item.dataset.disabled?!
              $value: item.dataset.item
              @click: (=> @selectIndex(idx))
              @mouseenter: (=> highlightedIndex = idx)
              = item.textContent
components.components/form.rip:
# Form — accessible headless form with validation and submission
#
# Wraps native <form> with submit handling, validation state, and
# loading indicator support. Prevents default submission and emits
# a 'submit' event. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Form @submit: handleSubmit
#     Field label: "Name"
#       Input value <=> name
#     Button
#       "Submit"

export Form = component
  @disabled:: boolean := false

  submitting := false
  submitted := false
  errors := {}

  _onSubmit: (e) ->
    e.preventDefault()
    return if @disabled or submitting
    submitting = true
    submitted = true
    @emit 'submit', { form: e.target }

  setErrors: (errs) ->
    errors = errs or {}

  setSubmitting: (val) ->
    submitting = val

  render
    form @submit: @_onSubmit, novalidate: true
      $disabled: @disabled?!
      $submitting: submitting?!
      $submitted: submitted?!
      slot
components.components/carousel.rip:
# Carousel — accessible headless slide carousel
#
# Displays one slide at a time with arrow key navigation, optional
# autoplay, and loop mode. Discovers slides from [data-slide] children.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Carousel loop: true
#     div $slide: true
#       img src: "slide1.jpg"
#     div $slide: true
#       img src: "slide2.jpg"
#     div $slide: true
#       img src: "slide3.jpg"
#
#   Carousel autoplay: true, interval: 5000, @change: handleSlide
#     div $slide: true, "Slide A"
#     div $slide: true, "Slide B"

export Carousel = component
  @orientation:: "horizontal" | "vertical" := "horizontal"
  @loop:: boolean := false
  @autoplay:: boolean := false
  @interval:: number := 4000
  @label:: string := "Carousel"

  activeIndex := 0
  _ready := false
  _timer = null

  _slides ~=
    return [] unless _ready
    return [] unless @_content
    Array.from(@_content.querySelectorAll('[data-slide]') or [])

  totalSlides ~= _slides.length

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true
    @_startAutoplay() if @autoplay

  beforeUnmount: ->
    @_stopAutoplay()

  _startAutoplay: ->
    @_stopAutoplay()
    _timer = setInterval (=> @next()), @interval

  _stopAutoplay: ->
    clearInterval _timer if _timer
    _timer = null

  goto: (idx) ->
    count = totalSlides
    return unless count
    if @loop
      idx = idx %% count
    else
      idx = Math.max(0, Math.min(idx, count - 1))
    activeIndex = idx
    @emit 'change', activeIndex

  next: -> @goto(activeIndex + 1)
  prev: -> @goto(activeIndex - 1)

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    horiz = @orientation is 'horizontal'
    switch e.key
      when (if horiz then 'ArrowRight' else 'ArrowDown')
        e.preventDefault()
        @next()
      when (if horiz then 'ArrowLeft' else 'ArrowUp')
        e.preventDefault()
        @prev()
      when 'Home'
        e.preventDefault()
        @goto(0)
      when 'End'
        e.preventDefault()
        @goto(totalSlides - 1)

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    _slides.forEach (el, idx) =>
      isActive = idx is activeIndex
      el.hidden = not isActive
      el.toggleAttribute 'data-active', isActive
      el.setAttribute 'role', 'tabpanel'
      el.setAttribute 'aria-roledescription', 'slide'
      el.setAttribute 'aria-label', "Slide #{idx + 1} of #{totalSlides}"

  onMouseenter: -> @_stopAutoplay() if @autoplay
  onMouseleave: -> @_startAutoplay() if @autoplay

  render
    div role: "region", aria-roledescription: "carousel", aria-label: @label, tabIndex: 0
      $orientation: @orientation
      @keydown: @onKeydown
      @mouseenter: @onMouseenter
      @mouseleave: @onMouseleave
      button $prev: true, aria-label: "Previous slide"
        disabled: not @loop and activeIndex <= 0
        $disabled: (not @loop and activeIndex <= 0)?!
        @click: (=> @prev())
      div ref: "_content"
        slot
      button $next: true, aria-label: "Next slide"
        disabled: not @loop and activeIndex >= totalSlides - 1
        $disabled: (not @loop and activeIndex >= totalSlides - 1)?!
        @click: (=> @next())

# Spinner — accessible headless loading indicator
#
# Announces loading state to screen readers via role="status".
# Exposes size as a CSS custom property for styling.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Spinner
#   Spinner label: "Saving...", size: "24px"

export Spinner = component
  @label:: string := "Loading"
  @size:: any := null

  render
    div role: "status", aria-label: @label
      style: if @size then "--spinner-size: #{@size}" else undefined
components.components/collapsible.rip:
# Collapsible — accessible headless expand/collapse section
#
# Single open/close section. Simpler than Accordion (no item IDs,
# no single/multiple mode). Exposes content dimensions as CSS
# custom properties for animated expand/collapse. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Collapsible open <=> isOpen
#     button $trigger: true, "Show details"
#     div $content: true
#       p "Hidden content here"

export Collapsible = component
  @open:: boolean := false
  @disabled:: boolean := false

  _ready := false

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true
    trigger = @_root?.querySelector('[data-trigger]')
    return unless trigger
    trigger.addEventListener 'click', => @toggle() unless @disabled
    trigger.addEventListener 'keydown', (e) =>
      if e.key in ['Enter', ' '] and not @disabled
        e.preventDefault()
        @toggle()

  toggle: ->
    @open = not @open
    @emit 'change', @open

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    trigger = @_root?.querySelector('[data-trigger]')
    content = @_root?.querySelector('[data-content]')
    if trigger
      trigger.setAttribute 'aria-expanded', !!@open
      if @disabled then trigger.setAttribute 'aria-disabled', true else trigger.removeAttribute 'aria-disabled'
      trigger.tabIndex = if @disabled then -1 else 0
    if content
      content.hidden = not @open
      if @open
        rect = content.getBoundingClientRect()
        content.style.setProperty '--collapsible-height', "#{rect.height}px"
        content.style.setProperty '--collapsible-width', "#{rect.width}px"

  render
    div ref: "_root", $open: @open?!, $disabled: @disabled?!
      slot
components.components/checkbox.rip:
# Checkbox — accessible headless checkbox/switch widget
#
# Toggles on click, Enter, or Space. Supports indeterminate state.
# Exposes $checked, $indeterminate, $disabled. Ships zero CSS.
# Set @switch to true for switch semantics (role="switch").
#
# Usage:
#   Checkbox checked <=> isActive, @change: handleChange
#     span "Enable notifications"
#
#   Checkbox checked <=> isDark, switch: true
#     span "Dark mode"

export Checkbox = component
  @checked:: boolean := false
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @indeterminate:: boolean := false
  @switch:: boolean := false

  onClick: ->
    return if @disabled
    @indeterminate = false
    @checked = not @checked
    @emit 'change', @checked

  render
    button role: @switch ? 'switch' : 'checkbox'
      aria-checked: @indeterminate ? 'mixed' : !!@checked
      aria-disabled: @disabled?!
      $checked: @checked?!
      $indeterminate: @indeterminate?!
      $disabled: @disabled?!
      slot
components.components/select.rip:
# Select — accessible headless select widget
#
# Keyboard: ArrowDown/Up to navigate, Enter/Space to select, Escape to close,
#           Home/End for first/last, typeahead to jump by character.
# Pointer: mouse/pen opens on pointerdown so release can land on an option in
#          one gesture; touch opens on click so scrolling can still be canceled.
#
# Exposes $open and $placeholder on button, $highlighted and $selected on options.
# Uses native Popover API in manual mode so pointerdown open does not get
# auto-dismissed by the same click lifecycle.
# Ships zero CSS — style entirely via attribute selectors in your stylesheet.
#
# Usage:
#   Select value <=> selectedValue, @change: (=> handle(event.detail))
#     option value: "a", "Option A"
#     option value: "b", "Option B"

export Select = component
  @value:: any := null
  @placeholder:: string := "Select..."
  @disabled:: boolean := false

  options := []
  open := false
  highlightedIndex := -1
  typeaheadBuffer := ''
  typeaheadTimer := null
  suppressTriggerClick := false
  suppressOptionClick := false
  _ready := false
  _popupGuard =! ARIA.popupGuard()
  _listId =! "sel-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  getOpt: (o) -> o.dataset.value ?? o.value

  _readOptions: ->
    options = Array.from(@_slot?.querySelectorAll('[data-value], option[value]') or [])

  selectedLabel ~=
    if @value?
      el = options.find (o) -> @getOpt(o) is String(@value)
      el?.textContent?.trim() or String(@value)
    else
      @placeholder

  openMenu: ->
    return unless _popupGuard.canOpen()
    @_readOptions()
    open = true
    highlightedIndex = Math.max(0, options.findIndex (o) -> @getOpt(o) is String(@value))
    requestAnimationFrame => @_focusHighlighted()

  close: (restoreFocus = true, blockOpen = false) ->
    open = false
    highlightedIndex = -1
    _popupGuard.block() if blockOpen
    @_trigger?.focus() if restoreFocus

  isDisabled: (opt) -> opt?.hasAttribute?('data-disabled') or opt?.disabled

  selectIndex: (idx) ->
    opt = options[idx]
    return unless opt
    return if @isDisabled(opt)
    @value = @getOpt(opt)
    @emit 'change', @value
    @close(true, true)

  onTriggerKeydown: (e) ->
    return if @disabled
    switch e.key
      when 'ArrowDown', 'ArrowUp', 'Enter', ' '
        e.preventDefault()
        @openMenu()
      when 'Escape'
        e.preventDefault()
        @close() if open

  onTriggerPointerdown: (e) ->
    return if @disabled
    return unless e.button is 0
    return if e.ctrlKey
    return unless e.pointerType in ['mouse', 'pen']
    return if open
    e.preventDefault()
    suppressTriggerClick = true
    @openMenu()

  onTriggerClick: (e) ->
    return if @disabled
    if suppressTriggerClick
      suppressTriggerClick = false
      e.preventDefault()
      return
    e.preventDefault()
    if open then @close(false, true) else @openMenu()

  onOptionPointerup: (e:: any) ->
    return unless open
    return unless e.button is 0
    return unless e.pointerType in ['mouse', 'pen']
    idx = Number(e.currentTarget.dataset.idx)
    suppressOptionClick = true
    @selectIndex(idx)

  onOptionClick: (e:: any) ->
    idx = Number(e.currentTarget.dataset.idx)
    if suppressOptionClick
      suppressOptionClick = false
      e.preventDefault()
      return
    @selectIndex(idx)

  _nextEnabled: (from, dir) ->
    len = options.length
    i = from
    loop len
      i = (i + dir) %% len
      return i unless @isDisabled(options[i])
    from

  onListKeydown: (e) ->
    return unless options.length
    ARIA.listNav e,
      next:    => highlightedIndex = @_nextEnabled(highlightedIndex,  1); @_focusHighlighted()
      prev:    => highlightedIndex = @_nextEnabled(highlightedIndex, -1); @_focusHighlighted()
      first:   => highlightedIndex = 0;                  @_focusHighlighted()
      last:    => highlightedIndex = options.length - 1; @_focusHighlighted()
      select:  => @selectIndex(highlightedIndex)
      dismiss: => @close()
      tab:     => @close(false, true)
      char:    => @_typeahead(e.key)

  _typeahead: (char) ->
    clearTimeout typeaheadTimer if typeaheadTimer
    typeaheadBuffer += char.toLowerCase()
    typeaheadTimer = setTimeout (-> typeaheadBuffer = ''), 500
    idx = options.findIndex (o) -> o.textContent.trim().toLowerCase().startsWith(typeaheadBuffer)
    if idx >= 0
      highlightedIndex = idx
      @_focusHighlighted()

  _focusHighlighted: ->
    el = @_list?.querySelectorAll('[role="option"]')?.[highlightedIndex]
    el?.focus()
    el?.scrollIntoView { block: 'nearest' }

  _applyPlacement: ->
    ARIA.position @_trigger, @_list, placement: 'bottom start', offset: 4, matchWidth: true

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true
    requestAnimationFrame => @_readOptions()

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    if @_list
      @_applyPlacement()
    ARIA.bindPopover open, (=> @_list), ((isOpen) => open = isOpen), (=> @_trigger)
    ARIA.popupDismiss open, (=> @_list), (=> @close(false, true)), [=> @_trigger]

  render
    .

      # Button
      button ref: "_trigger", role: "combobox"
        aria-expanded: !!open
        aria-haspopup: "listbox"
        aria-controls: open ? _listId : undefined
        $open: open?!
        $placeholder: (!@value)?!
        $disabled: @disabled?!
        disabled: @disabled
        @pointerdown: @onTriggerPointerdown
        @click: @onTriggerClick
        @keydown: @onTriggerKeydown
        span selectedLabel

      # Hidden slot for reading option definitions
      . ref: "_slot", style: "display:none"
        slot

      # Dropdown listbox
      div ref: "_list"
        id: _listId
        role: "listbox"
        popover: "manual"
        hidden: not open
        aria-hidden: (open ? undefined : "true")
        style: "position:fixed;margin:0;inset:auto"
        $open: open?!
        @keydown: @onListKeydown
        for opt, idx in options
          div role: "option"
            tabIndex: -1
            data-idx: idx
            $value: @getOpt(opt)
            $highlighted: (idx is highlightedIndex)?!
            $selected: (@getOpt(opt) is String(@value))?!
            $disabled: @isDisabled(opt)?!
            aria-selected: @getOpt(opt) is String(@value)
            aria-disabled: @isDisabled(opt)?!
            @pointerup: @onOptionPointerup
            @click: @onOptionClick
            @mouseenter: (=> highlightedIndex = idx)
            = opt.textContent
components.components/input.rip:
# Input — accessible headless input wrapper
#
# Tracks focus, validation, and disabled state via data attributes.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Input value <=> name, placeholder: "Enter name"
#   Input value <=> email, type: "email", required: true

export Input = component extends input
  @value:: string := ""
  @placeholder:: string := ""
  @type:: string := "text"
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @required:: boolean := false

  focused := false
  touched := false

  onInput: (e) -> @value = e.target.value
  onFocus: -> focused = true
  onBlur: ->
    focused = false
    touched = true

  render
    input type: @type, value: @value, placeholder: @placeholder
      disabled: @disabled
      required: @required
      aria-disabled: @disabled?!
      aria-required: @required?!
      $disabled: @disabled?!
      $focused: focused?!
      $touched: touched?!
      @focusin: @onFocus
      @focusout: @onBlur
components.components/textarea.rip:
# Textarea — accessible headless auto-resizing text area
#
# Tracks focus, validation, and disabled state via data attributes.
# Optional auto-resize adjusts height to fit content. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Textarea value <=> bio, placeholder: "Tell us about yourself"
#   Textarea value <=> notes, autoResize: true, rows: 3

export Textarea = component extends textarea
  @value:: string := ""
  @placeholder:: string := ""
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @required:: boolean := false
  @rows:: number := 3
  @autoResize:: boolean := false

  focused := false
  touched := false

  onInput: (e) ->
    @value = e.target.value
    @_resize(e.target) if @autoResize

  onFocus: -> focused = true
  onBlur: ->
    focused = false
    touched = true

  _resize: (el) ->
    el.style.height = 'auto'
    el.style.height = "#{el.scrollHeight}px"

  mounted: ->
    @_resize(@_root) if @autoResize and @value

  render
    textarea value: @value, placeholder: @placeholder, rows: @rows
      disabled: @disabled
      required: @required
      aria-disabled: @disabled?!
      aria-required: @required?!
      $disabled: @disabled?!
      $focused: focused?!
      $touched: touched?!
      @input: @onInput
      @focusin: @onFocus
      @focusout: @onBlur
components.components/fieldset.rip:
# Fieldset — accessible headless fieldset with legend
#
# Groups related fields with an optional legend. Disables all children
# when @disabled is set. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Fieldset legend: "Shipping Address"
#     Field label: "Street"
#       Input value <=> street
#     Field label: "City"
#       Input value <=> city

export Fieldset = component
  @legend:: string := ""
  @disabled:: boolean := false

  render
    fieldset disabled: @disabled, $disabled: @disabled?!
      if @legend
        legend $legend: true
          @legend
      slot
components.components/radio-group.rip:
# RadioGroup — accessible headless radio group
#
# Exactly one option can be selected. Arrow keys move focus and selection.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   RadioGroup value <=> size
#     div $value: "sm", "Small"
#     div $value: "md", "Medium"
#     div $value: "lg", "Large"

export RadioGroup = component
  @value:: any := null
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @orientation:: "horizontal" | "vertical" := "vertical"
  @name:: string := ""

  _options ~=
    return [] unless @_slot
    Array.from(@_slot.querySelectorAll('[data-value]') or [])

  _select: (val) ->
    return if @disabled
    @value = val
    @emit 'change', @value

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    radios = @_root?.querySelectorAll('[role="radio"]')
    return unless radios?.length
    focused = Array.from(radios).indexOf(document.activeElement)
    return if focused < 0
    len = radios.length
    move = (idx) => radios[idx]?.focus(); @_select(_options[idx]?.dataset.value)
    ARIA.rovingNav e, {
      next:  => move((focused + 1) %% len)
      prev:  => move((focused - 1) %% len)
      first: => move(0)
      last:  => move(len - 1)
    }, 'both'

  render
    div ref: "_root", role: "radiogroup", aria-orientation: @orientation
      $orientation: @orientation
      $disabled: @disabled?!

      . ref: "_slot", style: "display:none"
        slot

      for opt, idx in _options
        button role: "radio"
          tabindex: (if (opt.dataset.value is @value) or (@value is null and idx is 0) then "0" else "-1")
          aria-checked: opt.dataset.value is @value
          $checked: (opt.dataset.value is @value)?!
          $disabled: @disabled?!
          $value: opt.dataset.value
          @click: (=> @_select(opt.dataset.value))
          = opt.textContent
components.components/nav-menu.rip:
# NavigationMenu — accessible headless site navigation
#
# Horizontal navigation with optional dropdown sub-menus. Triggers show
# content on hover or click. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   NavigationMenu
#     a $link: true, href: "/", "Home"
#     div $trigger: "products"
#       div $panel: true
#         a href: "/ui", "ui"
#         a href: "/tools", "Tools"
#     a $link: true, href: "/about", "About"

export NavigationMenu = component
  @orientation:: "horizontal" | "vertical" := "horizontal"
  @hoverDelay:: number := 200
  @hoverCloseDelay:: number := 300

  activePanel := null
  _ready := false
  _hoverTimer := null
  _closeTimer := null

  _navItems ~=
    return [] unless @_slot
    Array.from(@_slot.children).filter (el) ->
      el.dataset?.link? or el.dataset?.trigger?

  mounted: -> _ready = true

  beforeUnmount: ->
    clearTimeout _hoverTimer if _hoverTimer
    clearTimeout _closeTimer if _closeTimer

  _openPanel: (id) ->
    clearTimeout _closeTimer if _closeTimer
    activePanel = id
    requestAnimationFrame => @_position(id)

  _closePanel: ->
    activePanel = null

  _scheduleOpen: (id) ->
    clearTimeout _closeTimer if _closeTimer
    _hoverTimer = setTimeout (=> @_openPanel(id)), @hoverDelay

  _scheduleClose: ->
    clearTimeout _hoverTimer if _hoverTimer
    _closeTimer = setTimeout (=> @_closePanel()), @hoverCloseDelay

  _cancelClose: ->
    clearTimeout _closeTimer if _closeTimer

  _position: (id) ->
    ARIA.positionBelow @_root?.querySelector("[data-nav-trigger=\"#{id}\"]"),
                       @_root?.querySelector("[data-nav-panel=\"#{id}\"]"), 2, false

  _onKeydown: (e) ->
    navBtns = @_root?.querySelectorAll('[data-nav-trigger], [data-nav-link]')
    return unless navBtns?.length
    focused = Array.from(navBtns).indexOf(document.activeElement)
    return if focused < 0
    len = navBtns.length
    switch e.key
      when 'ArrowRight'
        e.preventDefault()
        navBtns[(focused + 1) %% len]?.focus()
      when 'ArrowLeft'
        e.preventDefault()
        navBtns[(focused - 1) %% len]?.focus()
      when 'ArrowDown'
        triggerId = document.activeElement?.dataset?.navTrigger
        if triggerId
          e.preventDefault()
          @_openPanel(triggerId)
          @_root?.querySelector("[data-nav-panel=\"#{triggerId}\"] a, [data-nav-panel=\"#{triggerId}\"] button")?.focus()
      when 'Escape'
        @_closePanel()

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    if activePanel
      onDown   = (e) => @_closePanel() unless @_root?.contains(e.target)
      onScroll = => @_position(activePanel)
      document.addEventListener 'mousedown', onDown
      window.addEventListener   'scroll',    onScroll, true
      return ->
        document.removeEventListener 'mousedown', onDown
        window.removeEventListener   'scroll',    onScroll, true

  render
    nav ref: "_root", role: "navigation", aria-orientation: @orientation
      $orientation: @orientation

      . ref: "_slot", style: "display:none"
        slot

      for navItem, nIdx in _navItems
        if navItem.dataset.link?
          a $nav-link: true, href: navItem.getAttribute('href') or '#', tabIndex: 0
            @keydown: @_onKeydown
            = navItem.textContent
        else if navItem.dataset.trigger?
          . style: "display:inline-block;position:relative"
            button $nav-trigger: navItem.dataset.trigger, tabIndex: 0
              aria-expanded: activePanel is navItem.dataset.trigger
              $open: (activePanel is navItem.dataset.trigger)?!
              @click: (=> if activePanel is navItem.dataset.trigger then @_closePanel() else @_openPanel(navItem.dataset.trigger))
              @mouseenter: (=> @_scheduleOpen(navItem.dataset.trigger))
              @mouseleave: (=> @_scheduleClose())
              @keydown: @_onKeydown
              = navItem.dataset.trigger

            if activePanel is navItem.dataset.trigger
              div $nav-panel: navItem.dataset.trigger, $open: true
                style: "position:fixed;z-index:50"
                @mouseenter: (=> @_cancelClose())
                @mouseleave: (=> @_scheduleClose())
                for link, lIdx in Array.from(navItem.querySelectorAll('a, [data-link]'))
                  a href: link.getAttribute('href') or '#', tabIndex: 0
                    @keydown: (e) =>
                      if e.key is 'Escape'
                        @_closePanel()
                        @_root?.querySelector("[data-nav-trigger=\"#{navItem.dataset.trigger}\"]")?.focus()
                    = link.textContent
components.components/toggle-group.rip:
# ToggleGroup — accessible headless toggle group
#
# A set of two-state buttons where one or more can be pressed.
# Set @multiple to false for single-select (radio-like) behavior.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   ToggleGroup value <=> alignment
#     div $value: "left", "Left"
#     div $value: "center", "Center"
#     div $value: "right", "Right"

export ToggleGroup = component
  @value:: any := null
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @multiple:: boolean := false
  @orientation:: "horizontal" | "vertical" := "horizontal"

  _items ~=
    return [] unless @_slot
    Array.from(@_slot.querySelectorAll('[data-value]') or [])

  _isPressed: (item) ->
    val = item.dataset.value
    if @multiple
      Array.isArray(@value) and val in @value
    else
      val is @value

  _toggle: (val) ->
    return if @disabled
    if @multiple
      arr = if Array.isArray(@value) then [...@value] else []
      if val in arr
        arr = arr.filter (v) -> v isnt val
      else
        arr.push val
      @value = arr
    else
      @value = if val is @value then null else val
    @emit 'change', @value

  _buttons: ->
    Array.from(@_root?.querySelectorAll('button[aria-pressed]') or [])

  _syncTabStops: (focusIdx = null) ->
    buttons = @_buttons()
    return unless buttons.length
    idx = focusIdx
    if idx is null
      idx = buttons.indexOf(document.activeElement)
    if idx < 0
      idx = buttons.findIndex (btn) -> btn.getAttribute('aria-pressed') is 'true'
    idx = 0 if idx < 0
    buttons.forEach (btn, i) -> btn.tabIndex = if i is idx then 0 else -1

  _focusIndex: (idx) ->
    buttons = @_buttons()
    return unless buttons.length
    idx = Math.max(0, Math.min(idx, buttons.length - 1))
    @_syncTabStops(idx)
    buttons[idx]?.focus()

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    opts = @_buttons()
    return unless opts?.length
    focused = Array.from(opts).indexOf(document.activeElement)
    return if focused < 0
    len = opts.length
    ARIA.rovingNav e, {
      next:  => @_focusIndex((focused + 1) %% len)
      prev:  => @_focusIndex((focused - 1) %% len)
      first: => @_focusIndex(0)
      last:  => @_focusIndex(len - 1)
    }, @orientation

  onFocusin: (e) ->
    buttons = @_buttons()
    idx = buttons.indexOf(e.target)
    @_syncTabStops(idx) if idx >= 0

  mounted: ->
    requestAnimationFrame => @_syncTabStops()

  ~> @_syncTabStops()

  render
    div ref: "_root", role: "group", aria-orientation: @orientation
      $orientation: @orientation
      $disabled: @disabled?!

      . ref: "_slot", style: "display:none"
        slot

      for item, idx in _items
        button tabIndex: -1
          aria-pressed: !!@_isPressed(item)
          $pressed: @_isPressed(item)?!
          $disabled: @disabled?!
          $value: item.dataset.value
          @click: (=> @_toggle(item.dataset.value))
          = item.textContent
components.components/breadcrumb.rip:
# Breadcrumb — accessible headless navigation breadcrumb
#
# Renders a navigation trail with separator between items.
# The last item is automatically marked as the current page.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Breadcrumb
#     a $item: true, href: "/", "Home"
#     a $item: true, href: "/products", "Products"
#     span $item: true, "Widget Pro"
#
#   Breadcrumb separator: ">"
#     a $item: true, href: "/", "Home"
#     span $item: true, "Settings"

export Breadcrumb = component
  @separator:: string := "/"
  @label:: string := "Breadcrumb"

  _ready := false

  mounted: -> _ready = true

  _items ~=
    return [] unless _ready
    return [] unless @_content
    Array.from(@_content.querySelectorAll('[data-item]') or [])

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    items = _items
    return unless items.length
    @_content?.style.setProperty '--breadcrumb-separator', JSON.stringify(@separator)
    items.forEach (el, idx) =>
      isLast = idx is items.length - 1
      if isLast
        el.setAttribute 'aria-current', 'page'
        el.toggleAttribute 'data-current', true
      else
        el.removeAttribute 'aria-current'
        el.removeAttribute 'data-current'

  render
    nav aria-label: @label
      ol ref: "_content"
        slot
components.components/native-select.rip:
# NativeSelect — accessible headless native select wrapper
#
# Wraps a native <select> element with state tracking via data attributes.
# Use when the browser's built-in dropdown is preferred. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   NativeSelect value <=> role, @change: handleChange
#     option value: "", "Choose a role..."
#     option value: "admin", "Admin"
#     option value: "user", "User"

export NativeSelect = component
  @value:: string := ""
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @required:: boolean := false

  focused := false

  onChange: (e) ->
    e.isTrusted or return
    @value = e.target.value
    @emit 'change', @value

  render
    select value: @value, disabled: @disabled, required: @required
      aria-disabled: @disabled?!
      aria-required: @required?!
      $disabled: @disabled?!
      $focused: focused?!
      @change: @onChange
      @focusin: (=> focused = true)
      @focusout: (=> focused = false)
      slot
components.components/dialog.rip:
# Dialog — accessible headless modal dialog
#
# Native `<dialog>` variant that uses `showModal()` for top-layer modality.
# Restores focus to the previously focused element on close.
# Auto-wires aria-labelledby (first h1-h6) and aria-describedby (first p).
#
# Exposes $open on the backdrop. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Dialog open <=> showDialog, @close: handleClose
#     h2 "Title"
#     p "Content"
#     button @click: (=> showDialog = false), "Close"

export Dialog = component
  @open:: boolean := false
  @dismissable:: boolean := true
  @initialFocus:: any := null

  _id =! "dlg-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  ~>
    ARIA.bindDialog @open, (=> @_dialog), ((isOpen) =>
      if not isOpen and @open
        @open = false
        @emit 'close'
    ), @dismissable

  ~>
    if @open
      ARIA.lockScroll(this)
      requestAnimationFrame =>
        panel = @_dialog
        if panel
          ARIA.wireAria panel, _id
          if @initialFocus
            target = if typeof @initialFocus is 'string' then panel.querySelector(@initialFocus) else @initialFocus
            target?.focus()
          else
            panel.querySelectorAll('a[href],button:not([disabled]),input:not([disabled]),select:not([disabled]),textarea:not([disabled]),[tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])')?[0]?.focus()
      return ->
        ARIA.unlockScroll(this)

  close: ->
    @open = false
    @emit 'close'

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    if e.key is 'Escape'
      e.preventDefault()
      @close() if @dismissable

  onBackdropClick: (e) ->
    if e.target is e.currentTarget and @dismissable
      @_dialog?.close()

  render
    dialog ref: "_dialog"
      hidden: not @open
      aria-hidden: (@open ? undefined : "true")
      @click: @onBackdropClick
      @keydown: @onKeydown
      $open: @open?!
      slot
components.components/menu.rip:
# Menu — accessible headless dropdown menu
#
# Keyboard: ArrowDown/Up to navigate, Enter/Space to select, Escape to close,
# Home/End for first/last. Exposes $open on menu, $highlighted on items.
# Uses native `popover="auto"` + anchor positioning. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Menu
#     span "Actions"
#     div $item: "edit", "Edit"
#     div $item: "delete", "Delete"
#     div $item: "archive", "Archive"

export Menu = component
  @disabled:: boolean := false

  open := false
  highlightedIndex := -1
  typeaheadBuffer := ''
  typeaheadTimer := null
  _ready := false
  _id =! "menu-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  items ~=
    return [] unless @_slot
    Array.from(@_slot.querySelectorAll('[data-item]') or [])

  triggerLabel ~=
    return '' unless @_slot
    el = @_slot.querySelector(':not([data-item])')
    el?.textContent?.trim() or ''

  toggle: ->
    return if @disabled
    if open then @close() else @openMenu()

  openMenu: ->
    open = true
    highlightedIndex = 0
    requestAnimationFrame => @_list?.querySelectorAll('[role="menuitem"]')[0]?.focus()

  close: ->
    open = false
    highlightedIndex = -1
    @_trigger?.focus()

  selectIndex: (idx) ->
    item = items[idx]
    return unless item
    return if item.dataset.disabled?
    role = item.getAttribute('role')
    if role is 'menuitemcheckbox'
      checked = item.getAttribute('aria-checked') is 'true'
      item.setAttribute 'aria-checked', not checked
      @emit 'select', { id: item.dataset.item, checked: not checked }
    else if role is 'menuitemradio'
      group = item.closest('[data-radio-group]')
      if group
        group.querySelectorAll('[role="menuitemradio"]').forEach (r) ->
          r.setAttribute 'aria-checked', false
      item.setAttribute 'aria-checked', true
      @emit 'select', { id: item.dataset.item, value: item.dataset.item }
    else
      @emit 'select', item.dataset.item
      @close()

  _typeahead: (char) ->
    clearTimeout typeaheadTimer if typeaheadTimer
    typeaheadBuffer += char.toLowerCase()
    typeaheadTimer = setTimeout (-> typeaheadBuffer = ''), 500
    idx = items.findIndex (o) -> o.textContent.trim().toLowerCase().startsWith(typeaheadBuffer)
    if idx >= 0
      highlightedIndex = idx
      @_list?.querySelectorAll('[role="menuitem"]')[idx]?.focus()

  _applyPlacement: ->
    ARIA.position @_trigger, @_list, placement: 'bottom start', offset: 4

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true

  onTriggerKeydown: (e) ->
    return if @disabled
    if e.key in ['ArrowDown', 'Enter', ' ']
      e.preventDefault()
      @openMenu()

  _focusItem: (idx) ->
    highlightedIndex = idx
    @_list?.querySelectorAll('[role="menuitem"]')[idx]?.focus()

  onMenuKeydown: (e) ->
    len = items.length
    return unless len
    ARIA.listNav e,
      next:    => @_focusItem((highlightedIndex + 1) %% len)
      prev:    => @_focusItem((highlightedIndex - 1) %% len)
      first:   => @_focusItem(0)
      last:    => @_focusItem(len - 1)
      select:  => @selectIndex(highlightedIndex)
      dismiss: => @close()
      tab:     => @close()
      char:    => @_typeahead(e.key)

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    if @_list
      @_list.id = _id
      @_list.setAttribute 'popover', 'auto'
      @_applyPlacement()
    if @_trigger
      @_trigger.setAttribute 'aria-controls', _id
    ARIA.bindPopover open, (=> @_list), ((isOpen) => open = isOpen), (=> @_trigger)

  render
    .
      button ref: "_trigger"
        aria-haspopup: "menu"
        aria-expanded: !!open
        aria-controls: _id
        $open: open?!
        $disabled: @disabled?!
        disabled: @disabled
        @click: @toggle
        @keydown: @onTriggerKeydown
        triggerLabel

      . ref: "_slot", style: "display:none"
        slot

      div ref: "_list"
        id: _id
        role: "menu"
        popover: "auto"
        hidden: not open
        aria-hidden: (open ? undefined : "true")
        $open: open?!
        style: "position:fixed;margin:0;inset:auto"
        @keydown: @onMenuKeydown
        for item, idx in items
          div role: item.getAttribute('role') or 'menuitem'
            tabIndex: -1
            aria-checked: item.getAttribute('aria-checked')?!
            $highlighted: (idx is highlightedIndex)?!
            $disabled: item.dataset.disabled?!
            @click: (=> @selectIndex(idx))
            @mouseenter: (=> highlightedIndex = idx)
            = item.textContent
components.components/multi-select.rip:
# MultiSelect — accessible headless multi-select with chips
#
# Filterable dropdown where multiple items can be selected. Selected items
# appear as removable chips. Type to filter, click or arrow+Enter to toggle.
# Ships zero CSS — style entirely via attribute selectors in your stylesheet.
#
# Usage:
#   MultiSelect value <=> selectedColors, items: colors, placeholder: "Choose colors..."

export MultiSelect = component
  @value:: any[] := []
  @items:: any[] := []
  @placeholder:: string := "Select..."
  @disabled:: boolean := false

  open := false
  query := ''
  highlightedIndex := -1
  _ready := false
  _ignoreInputClickOnce := false
  _popupGuard =! ARIA.popupGuard()
  _listId =! "ms-#{Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}"

  filtered ~=
    q = query.trim().toLowerCase()
    return @items unless q
    @items.filter (item) ->
      label = if typeof item is 'string' then item else (item.label or item.name or String(item))
      label.toLowerCase().includes(q)

  # Block reopen briefly so the same pointer gesture that closed the popup
  # cannot immediately reopen it via focus/click side effects.
  _blockOpenBriefly: ->
    _popupGuard.block()

  _canOpen: ->
    _popupGuard.canOpen()

  _label: (item) ->
    if typeof item is 'string' then item else (item.label or item.name or String(item))

  _val: (item) ->
    if typeof item is 'string' then item else (item.value or item.id or String(item))

  _isSelected: (item) ->
    v = @_val(item)
    Array.isArray(@value) and v in @value

  _toggleItem: (item) ->
    return if @disabled
    v = @_val(item)
    arr = if Array.isArray(@value) then [...@value] else []
    if v in arr
      arr = arr.filter (x) -> x isnt v
    else
      arr.push v
    @value = arr
    @emit 'change', @value
    @_close(true, true)

  _removeChip: (v) ->
    return if @disabled
    @value = @value.filter (x) -> x isnt v
    @emit 'change', @value

  _onRemoveMousedown: (e) ->
    e.preventDefault()
    e.stopPropagation()
    @_blockOpenBriefly()

  _onInput: (e) ->
    query = e.target.value
    open = true
    highlightedIndex = if filtered.length > 0 then 0 else -1

  _openMenu: ->
    return if @disabled
    return unless @_canOpen()
    open = true
    highlightedIndex = if filtered.length > 0 then Math.max(highlightedIndex, 0) else -1

  _close: (restoreFocus = false, blockOpen = false) ->
    open = false
    query = ''
    highlightedIndex = -1
    @_blockOpenBriefly() if blockOpen
    @_input?.focus() if restoreFocus

  onFocusin: ->
    return unless @_canOpen()
    @_openMenu()

  _onInputMousedown: (e) ->
    return unless open and not query
    e.preventDefault()
    _ignoreInputClickOnce = true
    @_close(false, true)

  _onInputClick: ->
    if _ignoreInputClickOnce
      _ignoreInputClickOnce = false
      return
    return unless @_canOpen()
    @_openMenu()

  _onChipsClick: (e) ->
    return unless e.target is e.currentTarget
    if open and not query
      @_close(false, true)
      return
    return unless @_canOpen()
    @_input?.focus()
    @_openMenu() if document.activeElement is @_input

  onFocusout: ->
    setTimeout =>
      return if @_content?.contains(document.activeElement)
      @_close(false, true)
    , 0

  mounted: ->
    _ready = true

  _applyPlacement: ->
    ARIA.position @_content, @_list, placement: 'bottom start', offset: 2, matchWidth: true

  _onKeydown: (e) ->
    len = filtered.length
    switch e.key
      when 'ArrowDown'
        e.preventDefault()
        open = true
        highlightedIndex = (highlightedIndex + 1) %% len if len
      when 'ArrowUp'
        e.preventDefault()
        highlightedIndex = (highlightedIndex - 1) %% len if len
      when 'Enter'
        e.preventDefault()
        if highlightedIndex >= 0 and highlightedIndex < len
          @_toggleItem(filtered[highlightedIndex])
      when 'Escape'
        e.preventDefault()
        @_close()
      when 'Backspace'
        if not query and @value.length > 0
          @value = @value.slice(0, -1)
          @emit 'change', @value
      when 'Tab'
        @_close(false, true)

  ~>
    return unless _ready
    if @_list
      @_list.setAttribute 'popover', 'manual'
      @_applyPlacement()
    ARIA.bindPopover open, (=> @_list), ((isOpen) => open = isOpen), (=> @_input)
    ARIA.popupDismiss open, (=> @_list), (=> @_close(false, true)), [=> @_input, => @_content]

  render
    . ref: "_content", $open: open?!, $disabled: @disabled?!

      # Chip area + input
      . $chips: true, @click: @_onChipsClick
        for chip in @value
          span $chip: true
            "#{chip}"
            button $remove: true, aria-label: "Remove #{chip}", @mousedown: @_onRemoveMousedown, @click: (=> @_removeChip(chip))
              "✕"
        input ref: "_input", type: "text", autocomplete: "off"
          role: "combobox"
          aria-expanded: !!open
          aria-haspopup: "listbox"
          aria-controls: if open then _listId else undefined
          $disabled: @disabled?!
          disabled: @disabled
          placeholder: if @value.length is 0 then @placeholder else ''
          value: query
          @mousedown: @_onInputMousedown
          @input: @_onInput
          @click: @_onInputClick
          @keydown: @_onKeydown

      # Dropdown
      div ref: "_list"
        id: _listId
        role: "listbox"
        popover: "manual"
        hidden: not open
        aria-hidden: (open ? undefined : "true")
        $open: open?!
        aria-multiselectable: "true"
        style: "position:fixed;margin:0;inset:auto"
        for item, idx in filtered
          div role: "option", tabIndex: -1, id: "#{_listId}-#{idx}"
            $value: @_val(item)
            $selected: @_isSelected(item)?!
            $highlighted: (idx is highlightedIndex)?!
            aria-selected: !!@_isSelected(item)
            @click: (=> @_toggleItem(item))
            @mouseenter: (=> highlightedIndex = idx)
            @_label(item)
        if filtered.length is 0 and query
          div role: "status", aria-live: "polite", $empty: true
            "No results"
components.components/menubar.rip:
# Menubar — accessible headless horizontal menu bar
#
# A horizontal bar of menu triggers. Each trigger opens a dropdown menu.
# Arrow keys navigate between triggers; open menus close when moving
# to the next trigger. Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Menubar
#     div $menu: "file"
#       div $item: "new", "New"
#       div $item: "open", "Open"
#       div $item: "save", "Save"
#     div $menu: "edit"
#       div $item: "undo", "Undo"
#       div $item: "redo", "Redo"

export Menubar = component
  @disabled:: boolean := false

  activeMenu := null
  highlightedIndex := -1

  _menus ~=
    return [] unless @_slot
    Array.from(@_slot.querySelectorAll('[data-menu]') or [])

  _menuItemsFor: (menu) ->
    return [] unless menu
    Array.from(menu.querySelectorAll('[data-item]') or [])

  _openMenu: (menuId) ->
    return if @disabled
    activeMenu = menuId
    highlightedIndex = 0
    requestAnimationFrame =>
      @_position(menuId)
      @_root?.querySelector("[data-menu-list=\"#{menuId}\"] [role=\"menuitem\"]")?.focus()

  _closeMenu: ->
    activeMenu = null
    highlightedIndex = -1

  _position: (menuId) ->
    ARIA.positionBelow @_root?.querySelector("[data-menu-trigger=\"#{menuId}\"]"),
                       @_root?.querySelector("[data-menu-list=\"#{menuId}\"]"), 2, false

  selectItem: (menuId, itemId) ->
    @emit 'select', { menu: menuId, item: itemId }
    @_closeMenu()
    @_root?.querySelector("[data-menu-trigger=\"#{menuId}\"]")?.focus()

  _onBarKeydown: (e) ->
    triggers = @_root?.querySelectorAll('[data-menu-trigger]')
    return unless triggers?.length
    focused = Array.from(triggers).indexOf(document.activeElement)
    return if focused < 0
    len = triggers.length
    switch e.key
      when 'ArrowRight'
        e.preventDefault()
        next = (focused + 1) %% len
        triggers[next]?.focus()
        if activeMenu
          @_openMenu(triggers[next]?.dataset.menuTrigger)
      when 'ArrowLeft'
        e.preventDefault()
        prev = (focused - 1) %% len
        triggers[prev]?.focus()
        if activeMenu
          @_openMenu(triggers[prev]?.dataset.menuTrigger)
      when 'ArrowDown', 'Enter', ' '
        e.preventDefault()
        menuId = triggers[focused]?.dataset.menuTrigger
        @_openMenu(menuId) if menuId
      when 'Escape'
        @_closeMenu()

  _onMenuKeydown: (e, menuId, menuItems) ->
    len = menuItems.length
    return unless len
    switch e.key
      when 'ArrowDown'
        e.preventDefault()
        highlightedIndex = (highlightedIndex + 1) %% len
        @_root?.querySelector("[data-menu-list=\"#{menuId}\"]")?.querySelectorAll('[role="menuitem"]')[highlightedIndex]?.focus()
      when 'ArrowUp'
        e.preventDefault()
        highlightedIndex = (highlightedIndex - 1) %% len
        @_root?.querySelector("[data-menu-list=\"#{menuId}\"]")?.querySelectorAll('[role="menuitem"]')[highlightedIndex]?.focus()
      when 'Enter', ' '
        e.preventDefault()
        item = menuItems[highlightedIndex]
        @selectItem(menuId, item?.dataset.item) if item
      when 'Escape', 'Tab'
        e.preventDefault() if e.key is 'Escape'
        @_closeMenu()
        @_root?.querySelector("[data-menu-trigger=\"#{menuId}\"]")?.focus()
      when 'ArrowRight'
        e.preventDefault()
        @_closeMenu()
        triggers = @_root?.querySelectorAll('[data-menu-trigger]')
        focused = Array.from(triggers).findIndex (t) -> t.dataset.menuTrigger is menuId
        next = (focused + 1) %% triggers.length
        triggers[next]?.focus()
        @_openMenu(triggers[next]?.dataset.menuTrigger)
      when 'ArrowLeft'
        e.preventDefault()
        @_closeMenu()
        triggers = @_root?.querySelectorAll('[data-menu-trigger]')
        focused = Array.from(triggers).findIndex (t) -> t.dataset.menuTrigger is menuId
        prev = (focused - 1) %% triggers.length
        triggers[prev]?.focus()
        @_openMenu(triggers[prev]?.dataset.menuTrigger)

  ~>
    if activeMenu
      onDown   = (e) => @_closeMenu() unless @_root?.contains(e.target)
      onScroll = => @_position(activeMenu)
      document.addEventListener 'mousedown', onDown
      window.addEventListener   'scroll',    onScroll, true
      return ->
        document.removeEventListener 'mousedown', onDown
        window.removeEventListener   'scroll',    onScroll, true

  render
    div ref: "_root", role: "menubar", $disabled: @disabled?!

      . ref: "_slot", style: "display:none"
        slot

      for menu in _menus
        button role: "menuitem", tabIndex: 0
          "data-menu-trigger": menu.dataset.menu
          aria-haspopup: "menu"
          aria-expanded: activeMenu is menu.dataset.menu
          $open: (activeMenu is menu.dataset.menu)?!
          @click: (=> if activeMenu is menu.dataset.menu then @_closeMenu() else @_openMenu(menu.dataset.menu))
          @keydown: @_onBarKeydown
          = menu.dataset.menu

        if activeMenu is menu.dataset.menu
          div role: "menu", $open: true, style: "position:fixed"
            "data-menu-list": menu.dataset.menu
            @keydown: (e) => @_onMenuKeydown(e, menu.dataset.menu, @_menuItemsFor(menu))
            for item, idx in @_menuItemsFor(menu)
              div role: "menuitem", tabIndex: -1
                $highlighted: (idx is highlightedIndex)?!
                $value: item.dataset.item
                @click: (=> @selectItem(menu.dataset.menu, item.dataset.item))
                @mouseenter: (=> highlightedIndex = idx)
                = item.textContent
components.components/avatar.rip:
# Avatar — accessible headless avatar
#
# Shows an image, falls back to initials or a generic icon placeholder.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   Avatar src: user.photoUrl, alt: user.name, fallback: "AC"
#   Avatar fallback: "JD"
#   Avatar

export Avatar = component
  @src:: string := ""
  @alt:: string := ""
  @fallback:: string := ""

  imgError := false

  _onError: -> imgError = true

  _initials ~=
    return @fallback if @fallback
    return '' unless @alt
    parts = @alt.trim().split(/\s+/)
    chars = parts.map (p) -> p[0]?.toUpperCase() or ''
    chars.slice(0, 2).join('')

  render
    span role: "img", aria-label: @alt or 'Avatar'
      $status: if @src and not imgError then 'image' else if _initials then 'fallback' else 'placeholder'
      if @src and not imgError
        img src: @src, alt: @alt, @error: @_onError
      else if _initials
        span $initials: true
          _initials
      else
        span $placeholder: true
          "?"
components.components/checkbox-group.rip:
# CheckboxGroup — accessible headless checkbox group
#
# Multiple options can be checked independently. Wraps individual checkboxes
# with group semantics. Value is an array of checked option values.
# Ships zero CSS.
#
# Usage:
#   CheckboxGroup value <=> selectedToppings
#     div $value: "cheese", "Cheese"
#     div $value: "bacon", "Bacon"
#     div $value: "lettuce", "Lettuce"

export CheckboxGroup = component
  @value:: any[] := []
  @disabled:: boolean := false
  @orientation:: "horizontal" | "vertical" := "vertical"
  @label:: string := ""

  _options ~=
    return [] unless @_slot
    Array.from(@_slot.querySelectorAll('[data-value]') or [])

  _toggle: (val) ->
    return if @disabled
    arr = if Array.isArray(@value) then [...@value] else []
    if val in arr
      arr = arr.filter (v) -> v isnt val
    else
      arr.push val
    @value = arr
    @emit 'change', @value

  _boxes: ->
    Array.from(@_root?.querySelectorAll('[role="checkbox"]') or [])

  _syncTabStops: (focusIdx = null) ->
    boxes = @_boxes()
    return unless boxes.length
    idx = focusIdx
    if idx is null
      idx = boxes.indexOf(document.activeElement)
    idx = 0 if idx < 0
    boxes.forEach (box, i) -> box.tabIndex = if i is idx then 0 else -1

  _focusIndex: (idx) ->
    boxes = @_boxes()
    return unless boxes.length
    idx = Math.max(0, Math.min(idx, boxes.length - 1))
    @_syncTabStops(idx)
    boxes[idx]?.focus()

  onKeydown: (e) ->
    boxes = @_boxes()
    return unless boxes?.length
    focused = Array.from(boxes).indexOf(document.activeElement)
    return if focused < 0
    len = boxes.length
    ARIA.rovingNav e, {
      next:  => @_focusIndex((focused + 1) %% len)
      prev:  => @_focusIndex((focused - 1) %% len)
      first: => @_focusIndex(0)
      last:  => @_focusIndex(len - 1)
    }, @orientation

  onFocusin: (e) ->
    boxes = @_boxes()
    idx = boxes.indexOf(e.target)
    @_syncTabStops(idx) if idx >= 0

  mounted: ->
    requestAnimationFrame => @_syncTabStops()

  ~> @_syncTabStops()

  render
    div ref: "_root", role: "group", aria-label: @label or undefined, aria-orientation: @orientation
      $orientation: @orientation
      $disabled: @disabled?!

      . ref: "_slot", style: "display:none"
        slot

      for opt, idx in _options
        button role: "checkbox", tabIndex: -1
          aria-checked: opt.dataset.value in @value
          $checked: (opt.dataset.value in @value)?!
          $disabled: @disabled?!
          $value: opt.dataset.value
          @click: (=> @_toggle(opt.dataset.value))
          = opt.textContent
